glossary.defZh: 有右心功能受累或心肌标志物阳性，但没有持续性低血压或休克的PE。

glossary.termZh: 活化部分凝血活酶时间
glossary.defZh: 常用于监测普通肝素抗凝强度的凝血实验室指标。
因血流机械性阻塞导致心输出量下降和组织灌注不足的休克。

tokens.en: Tension pneumothorax
tokens.zh: 张力性气胸

tokens.en: Intermediate-risk/submassive pulmonary embolism
tokens.zh: 中危/次大面积肺栓塞

tokens.en: ST-elevation myocardial infarction
tokens.zh: ST段抬高型心肌梗死

tokens.en: Maintain ICU hemodynamic monitoring with a clear escalation plan
tokens.zh: 维持ICU血流动力学监测，并明确升级处理计划

tokens.en: Place the client supine or in Trendelenburg to raise blood pressure
tokens.zh: 将患者置于平卧位或Trendelenburg位以升高血压

tokens.en: Request systemic thrombolysis because troponin rose slightly
tokens.zh: 因肌钙蛋白小幅升高而要求全身溶栓

tokens.en: Continue the UFH infusion and monitor aPTT per protocol
tokens.zh: 继续UFH泵入，并按方案监测aPTT

tokens.en: Temperature 37.2 C
tokens.zh: 体温37.2 C

tokens.en: Serial D-dimer level
tokens.zh: 连续D-二聚体水平

tokens.en: SpO2 and respiratory rate trend
tokens.zh: SpO2和呼吸频率趋势

tokens.en: Heart rate and blood pressure trend
tokens.zh: 心率和血压趋势

title.en: Acute variceal hemorrhage in decompensated alcohol-related cirrhosis
title.zh: 失代偿性酒精相关肝硬化中的急性静脉曲张出血

summary.en: A 55-year-old man with alcohol-related cirrhosis, portal hypertension, known esophageal varices, ascites, and intermittent hepatic encephalopathy presents with large-volume bright red hematemesis, hypotension, tachycardia, and evidence of impaired hepatic synthetic function.
summary.zh: 一名55岁男性，有酒精相关肝硬化、门静脉高压、已知食管静脉曲张、腹水和间歇性肝性脑病。现因大量鲜红色呕血、低血压、心动过速以及肝脏合成功能受损表现来诊。

content.en: Known Child-Pugh B alcohol-related cirrhosis. Prior screening EGD showed grade II esophageal varices 18 months ago. He has ascites managed with furosemide and spironolactone, mild intermittent hepatic encephalopathy treated with lactulose, no anticoagulants, no NSAIDs, and no beta-blocker because baseline systolic pressures were in the low 90s.
content.zh: 已知Child-Pugh B级酒精相关肝硬化。18个月前筛查胃镜显示II级食管静脉曲张。腹水使用呋塞米和螺内酯管理，轻度间歇性肝性脑病使用乳果糖治疗；未使用抗凝药或NSAID，也未因基础收缩压在90 mmHg出头而使用β受体阻滞剂。

content.en: Large-volume bright red hematemesis occurred about 45 minutes before arrival, with another episode during transport. Vitals: T 36.8 C, HR 118, BP 88/54, RR 20, SpO2 96% on 2 L nasal cannula. He is pale and diaphoretic with dried blood around the mouth. Abdomen is distended with fluid wave and shifting dullness. Caput medusae, spider angiomata, scleral icterus, and 2+ lower-extremity edema are present. He is alert and oriented with no asterixis.
content.zh: 到院前约45分钟出现大量鲜红色呕血，途中再次呕血。生命体征：T 36.8 C，HR 118，BP 88/54，RR 20，鼻导管2 L/min下SpO2 96%。患者苍白、出汗，口周有干血迹。腹部膨隆，有液波震颤和移动性浊音。可见海蛇头样静脉曲张、蜘蛛痣、巩膜黄染和双下肢2+水肿。患者清醒定向，无扑翼样震颤。

content.en: Hgb 8.1 g/dL, Hct 24.3%, platelets 72,000/µL, WBC 6,200/µL, Na 131 mEq/L, K 3.6 mEq/L, BUN 32 mg/dL, creatinine 1.3 mg/dL (baseline 1.0), total bilirubin 3.8 mg/dL, albumin 2.4 g/dL, INR 1.9, lactate 3.4 mmol/L, ammonia 62 µmol/L. Type and screen sent; crossmatch ordered for 4 units PRBC.
content.zh: Hgb 8.1 g/dL，Hct 24.3%，血小板72,000/µL，WBC 6,200/µL，Na 131 mEq/L，K 3.6 mEq/L，BUN 32 mg/dL，肌酐1.3 mg/dL（基础1.0），总胆红素3.8 mg/dL，白蛋白2.4 g/dL，INR 1.9，乳酸3.4 mmol/L，氨62 µmol/L。已送血型筛查；已申请4单位红细胞交叉配血。

content.en: Two 16-gauge IVs are placed. A 500 mL normal saline bolus is started. Orders include octreotide 50 mcg IV bolus then 50 mcg/hr infusion, ceftriaxone 1 g IV daily, pantoprazole infusion, NPO status, NG tube placement, and emergent GI consult. NG tube returns bright red blood with clots. After the bolus, HR 112, BP 92/58, and the patient vomits another 200 mL bright red blood. Point-of-care Hgb is 7.2 g/dL, lactate rises to 4.1 mmol/L, and urine output is 25 mL in the first hour. The provider orders 1 unit PRBC with target Hgb 7-8 g/dL.
content.zh: 置入两条16G外周静脉通路，开始500 mL生理盐水快速输注。医嘱包括奥曲肽50 mcg静推后以50 mcg/hr泵入、头孢曲松1 g IV每日一次、泮托拉唑泵入、禁食、置入胃管和急诊消化科会诊。胃管引出鲜红色血液和小血块。补液后HR 112，BP 92/58，患者再次呕出约200 mL鲜红色血液。床旁Hgb 7.2 g/dL，乳酸升至4.1 mmol/L，第1小时尿量25 mL。医嘱输注1单位红细胞，目标Hgb 7-8 g/dL。

title.en: Stage 2: 90 minutes to 4 hours after arrival
title.zh: 第2阶段：到院后90分钟至4小时

title.en: Stage 2: 90 minutes to 4 hours after arrival
title.zh: 第2阶段：到院后90分钟至4小时

content.en: Emergent EGD under airway protection shows three columns of large distal esophageal varices with active spurting from one varix and a red wale sign on another. Six bands are placed and hemostasis is achieved. In the ICU, HR 96, BP 104/62, RR 16, SpO2 98% on 2 L. Post-transfusion Hgb is 7.8 g/dL, lactate 2.6 mmol/L, urine output 40 mL/hr. He is drowsy but arousable and oriented. No further hematemesis. Small melena is noted. Four-hour labs show creatinine 1.5 mg/dL, INR 2.0, platelets 68,000/µL, and ammonia 78 µmol/L.
content.zh: 气道保护下急诊胃镜显示远端食管三列大型静脉曲张，其中一处活动性喷射出血，另一处有红色征；置入6个套扎环后止血成功。入ICU时HR 96，BP 104/62，RR 16，2 L吸氧下SpO2 98%。输血后Hgb 7.8 g/dL，乳酸2.6 mmol/L，尿量40 mL/hr。患者嗜睡但可唤醒且定向，无再次呕血，可见少量黑便。4小时化验显示肌酐1.5 mg/dL，INR 2.0，血小板68,000/µL，氨78 µmol/L。

content.en: Overnight, the patient becomes confused and somnolent, opens eyes to voice, follows simple commands, believes he is at home, and develops asterixis. Vitals: HR 82, BP 108/66, RR 14, SpO2 97% room air, T 37.9 C. Hgb 7.6 g/dL is stable with no further hematemesis. Labs: creatinine 1.8 mg/dL, urine output 15 mL/hr, ammonia 124 µmol/L, lactate 1.8 mmol/L. Diagnostic paracentesis shows ascitic WBC 620 cells/µL with 78% neutrophils, absolute neutrophil count 484 cells/µL, and SAAG 1.3 g/dL. Orders include lactulose every 2 hours titrated to 3-4 bowel movements/day, rifaximin every 12 hours, holding diuretics, and urgent SBP evaluation/treatment reassessment.
content.zh: 夜间患者出现意识混乱和嗜睡，对声音睁眼，可执行简单指令，但认为自己在家，并出现扑翼样震颤。生命体征：HR 82，BP 108/66，RR 14，室内空气SpO2 97%，T 37.9 C。Hgb 7.6 g/dL稳定，无再次呕血。化验：肌酐1.8 mg/dL，尿量15 mL/hr，氨124 µmol/L，乳酸1.8 mmol/L。诊断性腹腔穿刺显示腹水WBC 620 cells/µL，其中78%为中性粒细胞，绝对中性粒细胞计数484 cells/µL，SAAG 1.3 g/dL。医嘱包括乳果糖每2小时一次并滴定至每日3-4次排便、利福昔明每12小时一次、暂停利尿剂，以及紧急评估/重新评估SBP治疗。

stem.en: Highlight the findings that support the pattern of acute variceal hemorrhage in a decompensated cirrhotic patient.
stem.zh: 请标出支持失代偿性肝硬化患者发生急性静脉曲张出血这一临床模式的发现。

segments.en: Large-volume bright red hematemesis about 45 minutes before arrival.
segments.zh: 到院前约45分钟出现大量鲜红色呕血。

segments.en: Second smaller episode of hematemesis occurred during transport.
segments.zh: 来院途中再次出现少量呕血。

segments.en: HR 118 beats/min.
segments.zh: 心率118次/分。

segments.en: BP 88/54 mmHg.
segments.zh: 血压88/54 mmHg。

segments.en: Pale, diaphoretic appearance with capillary refill of 3 seconds.
segments.zh: 面色苍白、出汗，毛细血管再充盈时间3秒。

segments.en: SpO2 96% on 2 L nasal cannula.
segments.zh: 鼻导管2 L/min吸氧下SpO2为96%。

segments.en: Clear breath sounds bilaterally.
segments.zh: 双肺呼吸音清晰。

segments.en: Moderate-to-large ascites with fluid wave and shifting dullness.
segments.zh: 中到大量腹水，有液波震颤和移动性浊音。

segments.en: Caput medusae on the anterior abdominal wall.
segments.zh: 腹前壁可见海蛇头样静脉曲张。

segments.en: Spider angiomata on the upper chest.
segments.zh: 上胸部可见蜘蛛痣。

segments.en: Scleral icterus.
segments.zh: 巩膜黄染。

segments.en: No asterixis and coherent speech.
segments.zh: 无扑翼样震颤，讲话连贯。

segments.en: INR 1.9.
segments.zh: INR 1.9。

segments.en: Platelets 72,000/µL.
Albumin 2.4 g/dL.
segments.zh: 白蛋白2.4 g/dL。

segments.en: Glucose 102 mg/dL.
segments.zh: 血糖102 mg/dL。

correct.en: The emergency pattern is massive hematemesis with shock physiology, plus clear evidence of portal hypertension and impaired hepatic synthetic function. Normal oxygenation, clear lungs, normal glucose, and absence of asterixis are useful baselines but do not explain the acute hemorrhage.
correct.zh: 本题的紧急模式是大量呕血伴休克生理表现，同时存在门静脉高压和肝脏合成功能受损的证据。氧合尚可、双肺清晰、血糖正常以及暂时无扑翼样震颤有助于建立基线，但不能解释当前急性出血。

byChoice.en: Large-volume bright red hematemesis about 45 minutes before arrival. This is part of the variceal-bleed pattern.
byChoice.zh: 到院前约45分钟出现大量鲜红色呕血。 这是静脉曲张出血模式的一部分。

byChoice.en: Second smaller episode of hematemesis occurred during transport. This is part of the variceal-bleed pattern.
byChoice.zh: 来院途中再次出现少量呕血。 这是静脉曲张出血模式的一部分。

byChoice.en: HR 118 beats/min. This is part of the variceal-bleed pattern.
byChoice.zh: 心率118次/分。 这是静脉曲张出血模式的一部分。

byChoice.en: BP 88/54 mmHg. This is part of the variceal-bleed pattern.
byChoice.zh: 血压88/54 mmHg。 这是静脉曲张出血模式的一部分。

byChoice.en: Pale, diaphoretic appearance with capillary refill of 3 seconds. This is part of the variceal-bleed pattern.
byChoice.zh: 面色苍白、出汗，毛细血管再充盈时间3秒。 这是静脉曲张出血模式的一部分。

byChoice.en: SpO2 96% on 2 L nasal cannula. This is not a defining cue for the acute hemorrhagic pattern in this case.
byChoice.zh: 鼻导管2 L/min吸氧下SpO2为96%。 这不是本病例急性出血模式的决定性线索。

byChoice.en: Clear breath sounds bilaterally. This is not a defining cue for the acute hemorrhagic pattern in this case.
byChoice.zh: 双肺呼吸音清晰。 这不是本病例急性出血模式的决定性线索。

byChoice.en: Moderate-to-large ascites with fluid wave and shifting dullness. This is part of the variceal-bleed pattern.
byChoice.zh: 中到大量腹水，有液波震颤和移动性浊音。 这是静脉曲张出血模式的一部分。

byChoice.en: Caput medusae on the anterior abdominal wall. This is part of the variceal-bleed pattern.
byChoice.zh: 腹前壁可见海蛇头样静脉曲张。 这是静脉曲张出血模式的一部分。

byChoice.en: Spider angiomata on the upper chest. This is part of the variceal-bleed pattern.
byChoice.zh: 上胸部可见蜘蛛痣。 这是静脉曲张出血模式的一部分。

byChoice.en: Scleral icterus. This is part of the variceal-bleed pattern.
byChoice.zh: 巩膜黄染。 这是静脉曲张出血模式的一部分。

byChoice.en: No asterixis and coherent speech. This is not a defining cue for the acute hemorrhagic pattern in this case.
byChoice.zh: 无扑翼样震颤，讲话连贯。 这不是本病例急性出血模式的决定性线索。

byChoice.en: INR 1.9. This is part of the variceal-bleed pattern.
byChoice.zh: INR 1.9。 这是静脉曲张出血模式的一部分。

byChoice.en: Platelets 72,000/µL. This is part of the variceal-bleed pattern.
byChoice.zh: 血小板72,000/µL。 这是静脉曲张出血模式的一部分。

byChoice.en: Albumin 2.4 g/dL. This is part of the variceal-bleed pattern.
byChoice.zh: 白蛋白2.4 g/dL。 这是静脉曲张出血模式的一部分。

byChoice.en: Glucose 102 mg/dL. This is not a defining cue for the acute hemorrhagic pattern in this case.
byChoice.zh: 血糖102 mg/dL。 这不是本病例急性出血模式的决定性线索。

testTakingStrategy.en: Cluster cues instead of reacting to one lab. In cirrhosis, hematemesis plus portal-hypertension stigmata and poor hemostatic reserve points to variceal hemorrhage.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 要把线索组合起来看，不要只盯着单个化验值。肝硬化患者出现呕血，再加门静脉高压体征和止血储备差，应优先想到静脉曲张出血。

glossary.defZh: 门静脉高压导致食管或胃静脉曲张破裂出血。
门静脉系统压力升高，可导致腹水、食管静脉曲张和腹壁静脉曲张。
腹壁浅静脉扩张，是门静脉高压的体征之一。
肝脏合成凝血因子和白蛋白的能力下降，可表现为INR升高和低白蛋白。

stem.en: Complete the clinical judgment statement about the Stage 1 trend.
stem.zh: 请补全关于第1阶段病情趋势的临床判断。

clozeStem.en: The Stage 1 findings indicate {{1}} because the patient has {{2}} and {{3}} despite initial crystalloid resuscitation.
clozeStem.zh: 第1阶段的发现提示 {{1}}，因为患者在初步晶体液复苏后仍有 {{2}} 和 {{3}}。

options.en: expected anxiety after seeing blood
options.zh: 看到出血后的预期焦虑反应

options.en: ongoing hemorrhagic shock with inadequate tissue perfusion
options.zh: 持续性失血性休克并组织灌注不足

options.en: stable recovery after the fluid bolus
options.zh: 补液后已稳定恢复

options.en: a lactate rise from 3.4 to 4.1 mmol/L
options.zh: 乳酸从3.4升至4.1 mmol/L

options.en: a normal glucose of 102 mg/dL
options.zh: 血糖102 mg/dL正常

options.en: clear bilateral breath sounds
options.zh: 双肺呼吸音清晰

options.en: only 25 mL urine output in the first hour
options.zh: 第1小时尿量仅25 mL

options.en: hemoglobin now above the target range
options.zh: 血红蛋白已高于目标范围

options.en: oxygen saturation of 97% on nasal cannula
options.zh: 鼻导管吸氧下SpO2为97%

correct.en: The marginal BP response, persistent tachycardia, repeat hematemesis, rising lactate, and oliguria show that perfusion remains inadequate. A hemoglobin of 7.2 g/dL in this context supports single-unit PRBC transfusion to the stated restrictive target, not liberal transfusion.
correct.zh: 血压仅轻微改善、心动过速持续、再次呕血、乳酸升高以及少尿，说明灌注仍不足。在这种情况下血红蛋白7.2 g/dL支持按限制性目标输注1单位红细胞，而不是宽松输血。

byChoice.en: Ongoing hemorrhagic shock is correct because perfusion markers are worsening despite the initial bolus. Anxiety or stable recovery would not explain rising lactate and oliguria.
byChoice.zh: 持续性失血性休克正确，因为初步补液后灌注指标仍在恶化。单纯焦虑或稳定恢复不能解释乳酸升高和少尿。

byChoice.en: The rising lactate is the key perfusion cue. Normal glucose and clear lungs are useful but do not show worsening tissue oxygen debt.
byChoice.zh: 乳酸升高是关键的灌注线索。血糖正常和双肺清晰有参考价值，但不能说明组织缺氧债加重。

byChoice.en: Urine output of 25 mL in the first hour indicates renal hypoperfusion. Oxygenation is not the failing parameter, and the hemoglobin is near the restrictive transfusion threshold rather than above target.
byChoice.zh: 第1小时尿量25 mL提示肾灌注不足。氧合不是当前失败的指标；血红蛋白接近限制性输血阈值，而不是高于目标范围。

testTakingStrategy.en: For shock questions, trend perfusion markers together: mental status, urine output, lactate, HR/BP response, and ongoing losses.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 休克题要把灌注指标放在一起看：意识状态、尿量、乳酸、心率/血压反应以及是否仍在丢失血容量。

glossary.defZh: 组织缺氧或灌注不足时可升高的代谢指标。
尿量减少，常提示肾灌注不足或肾功能受损。
只在较低血红蛋白阈值或有临床需要时输血，以避免过度容量负荷。

stem.en: Which bleeding source should guide the nurse's priority hypothesis and anticipated plan of care before endoscopic confirmation?
stem.zh: 在内镜确认前，护士应以哪一种出血来源作为优先假设并据此预期护理计划？

options.en: Mallory-Weiss tear from forceful retching
options.zh: 剧烈干呕导致的贲门黏膜撕裂

options.en: Lower gastrointestinal bleeding from hemorrhoids
options.zh: 痔疮导致的下消化道出血

options.en: Esophageal variceal hemorrhage related to portal hypertension
options.zh: 门静脉高压相关的食管静脉曲张出血

options.en: Peptic ulcer bleeding from NSAID use
options.zh: NSAID使用导致的消化性溃疡出血

correct.en: Known cirrhosis, portal hypertension, documented esophageal varices, large-volume hematemesis, ascites, caput medusae, and coagulopathy all point to variceal hemorrhage. The nurse should anticipate variceal-specific therapy while endoscopy is being arranged.
correct.zh: 已知肝硬化、门静脉高压、既往食管静脉曲张、大量呕血、腹水、海蛇头样静脉曲张和凝血异常共同指向静脉曲张出血。安排内镜的同时，护士应预期静脉曲张出血的特异性治疗。

byChoice.en: Hemorrhoids cause lower GI bleeding, not large-volume bright red hematemesis.
byChoice.zh: 痔疮导致下消化道出血，不会造成大量鲜红色呕血。

byChoice.en: Peptic ulcer disease remains possible in upper GI bleeding, but this patient denies NSAID use and has a stronger variceal risk pattern.
byChoice.zh: 上消化道出血仍可能来自消化性溃疡，但患者否认NSAID使用，且静脉曲张风险模式更强。

byChoice.en: This is the best hypothesis because the patient has known portal hypertension and prior esophageal varices with massive hematemesis.
byChoice.zh: 这是最佳假设，因为患者有已知门静脉高压和既往食管静脉曲张，并出现大量呕血。

byChoice.en: A Mallory-Weiss tear usually follows forceful retching and is not the priority hypothesis when known varices and portal hypertension are present.
byChoice.zh: 贲门黏膜撕裂通常发生在剧烈干呕后；在已知静脉曲张和门静脉高压存在时，不是优先假设。

testTakingStrategy.en: Use the history that changes management. Prior varices plus cirrhosis turns hematemesis into a presumed variceal bleed until proven otherwise.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 抓住会改变处理方向的病史。既往静脉曲张加肝硬化，使呕血在证实前应按疑似静脉曲张出血处理。

glossary.defZh: 门静脉高压导致食管静脉扩张，破裂时可发生危及生命的呕血。
胃或十二指肠黏膜破损，可导致上消化道出血。
呕吐或干呕后胃食管交界处黏膜撕裂导致出血。

stem.en: The provider orders 1 unit PRBC with a target hemoglobin of 7-8 g/dL. Which concurrent interventions should the nurse implement or anticipate? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 医嘱输注1单位浓缩红细胞，目标血红蛋白7-8 g/dL。护士应执行或预期哪些同步干预？选择所有适用项。

options.en: Maintain NPO status and prepare for emergent EGD with band ligation.
options.zh: 维持禁食，准备急诊胃镜及套扎止血。

options.en: Transfuse additional PRBCs until hemoglobin reaches 10 g/dL.
options.zh: 继续输注红细胞直到血红蛋白达到10 g/dL。

options.en: Administer ceftriaxone prophylaxis as ordered.
options.zh: 按医嘱给予头孢曲松预防性抗感染。

options.en: Position with head of bed elevated and maintain airway readiness.
options.zh: 抬高床头并保持气道准备。

options.en: Give fresh frozen plasma solely to normalize the INR before endoscopy.
options.zh: 仅为在内镜前纠正INR而输注新鲜冰冻血浆。

options.en: Continue the octreotide infusion as ordered.
options.zh: 按医嘱继续奥曲肽静脉泵入。

correct.en: Octreotide, ceftriaxone, endoscopy readiness, NPO status, and airway protection are concurrent priorities in suspected variceal hemorrhage. The case protocol sets a restrictive PRBC target; routine liberal transfusion or large-volume plasma just to normalize cirrhosis-related INR can worsen volume/portal-pressure problems and delay definitive hemostasis.
correct.zh: 疑似静脉曲张出血时，奥曲肽、头孢曲松、内镜准备、禁食和气道保护是同步优先事项。本病例方案设定限制性红细胞输血目标；常规宽松输血或仅为纠正肝硬化相关INR而大量输注血浆，可能加重容量/门静脉压力问题并延误最终止血。

byChoice.en: Ceftriaxone is ordered for infection/SBP prophylaxis in a cirrhotic patient with GI hemorrhage.
byChoice.zh: 肝硬化合并消化道出血时，头孢曲松用于感染/SBP预防。

byChoice.en: A hemoglobin target of 10 g/dL is too liberal for this protocol and may increase portal pressure and rebleeding risk.
byChoice.zh: 把血红蛋白目标定到10 g/dL对本方案过于宽松，可能升高门静脉压力并增加再出血风险。

byChoice.en: Active hematemesis creates aspiration risk; positioning and airway readiness are nursing priorities.
byChoice.zh: 活动性呕血有误吸风险；体位和气道准备是护理优先事项。

byChoice.en: Octreotide reduces splanchnic blood flow and is used as a bridge to and after endoscopic therapy.
byChoice.zh: 奥曲肽可减少内脏血流，是内镜治疗前后用于降低静脉曲张出血风险的药物。

byChoice.en: Endoscopic band ligation is the definitive hemostatic intervention for active esophageal variceal bleeding, so NPO and preparation are appropriate.
byChoice.zh: 内镜套扎是活动性食管静脉曲张出血的关键止血措施，因此禁食和准备内镜是正确的。

byChoice.en: Chronic cirrhosis-related INR elevation is not an automatic reason to delay endoscopy for plasma correction; plasma adds volume and can worsen portal-pressure physiology.
byChoice.zh: 慢性肝硬化导致的INR升高并不自动要求为输血浆而推迟内镜；血浆会增加容量，可能加重门静脉压力问题。

testTakingStrategy.en: When several actions are ordered for an unstable bleed, separate concurrent stabilizing actions from harmful attempts to normalize every lab value.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 不稳定出血题中有多项医嘱时，要区分同步稳定病情的措施和“纠正每个异常化验值”的有害做法。

glossary.defZh: 可降低内脏血流和门静脉压力的药物，常用于静脉曲张出血。
用橡皮圈结扎出血静脉曲张以达到止血。
含凝血因子的血液制品；不应仅因肝硬化INR升高而常规用于内镜前纠正。

stem.en: For each immediate post-banding nursing action or interpretation, indicate whether it is appropriate now.
stem.zh: 对于内镜套扎后的每项护理行动或判断，请判断当前是否适当。

rows.en: Continue the octreotide infusion per protocol.
rows.zh: 按方案继续奥曲肽泵入。

rows.en: Monitor for true rebleeding: new hematemesis, hemodynamic decline, or falling serial hemoglobin.
rows.zh: 监测真正再出血迹象：再次呕血、血流动力学恶化或连续血红蛋白下降。

rows.en: Treat the small amount of melena alone as proof of active rebleeding.
rows.zh: 仅凭少量黑便就认定为活动性再出血。

rows.en: Stop ceftriaxone because endoscopic hemostasis was achieved.
rows.zh: 因内镜止血成功而停止头孢曲松。

rows.en: Monitor mental status, ammonia trend, urine output, and creatinine.
rows.zh: 监测意识状态、氨水平趋势、尿量和肌酐。

rows.en: Transfuse more PRBCs now because hemoglobin is 7.8 g/dL.
rows.zh: 因血红蛋白7.8 g/dL立即继续输注红细胞。

correct.en: After banding, the hemorrhage markers are improving, but early rebleeding, infection, hepatic encephalopathy, and renal injury remain major risks. Melena alone can reflect digested earlier blood when hemoglobin and hemodynamics are stable.
correct.zh: 套扎后出血指标改善，但早期再出血、感染、肝性脑病和肾损伤仍是主要风险。在血红蛋白和血流动力学稳定时，单独黑便可来自先前出血的消化血液。

byChoice.en: Continuing octreotide is appropriate because vasoactive therapy is commonly continued after hemostasis to reduce early rebleeding risk.
byChoice.zh: 继续奥曲肽适当，因为止血后通常继续血管活性治疗以降低早期再出血风险。

byChoice.en: These are the correct indicators of recurrent bleeding and should be monitored closely.
byChoice.zh: 这些是真正再出血的正确指标，应密切监测。

byChoice.en: Melena alone is not proof of new bleeding when it follows large hematemesis and the hemoglobin and vital signs are stable.
byChoice.zh: 大量呕血后出现黑便，若血红蛋白和生命体征稳定，单独黑便不能证明新出血。

byChoice.en: Antibiotic prophylaxis is not stopped simply because banding controlled the bleeding.
byChoice.zh: 不能仅因套扎控制出血就停止预防性抗生素。

byChoice.en: Rising ammonia and creatinine after the bleed make encephalopathy and renal injury important surveillance targets.
byChoice.zh: 出血后氨和肌酐升高，使肝性脑病和肾损伤成为重要监测目标。

byChoice.en: Hemoglobin 7.8 g/dL is within the stated restrictive target, so more PRBCs are not indicated based on this value alone.
byChoice.zh: 血红蛋白7.8 g/dL在本方案限制性目标范围内，不能仅凭此数值继续输血。

testTakingStrategy.en: After an intervention, evaluate trajectory: what improved, what remains risky, and what finding is expected from earlier events.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 干预后要评估趋势：哪些改善了、哪些仍有风险、哪些发现可由先前事件解释。

glossary.defZh: 已控制的出血再次发生，可表现为新呕血、血压下降、心率上升或血红蛋白下降。
消化后的血液使粪便呈黑色柏油样，可来自先前上消化道出血。
晚期肝病中有效循环血量下降和肾血流改变导致肾功能恶化的过程。

stem.en: At Stage 3, which conclusions or nursing actions are supported by the current data? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 第3阶段，根据当前资料支持哪些结论或护理行动？选择所有适用项。

options.en: Notify the provider that ascitic PMN count meets the SBP diagnostic threshold and anticipate antibiotic reassessment.
options.zh: 通知医护团队腹水PMN计数达到SBP诊断阈值，并预期重新评估抗生素方案。

options.en: Recognize hepatic encephalopathy and administer lactulose/rifaximin as ordered.
options.zh: 识别肝性脑病，并按医嘱给予乳果糖/利福昔明。

options.en: Continue serial neurological assessments, including orientation, level of consciousness, and asterixis.
options.zh: 继续连续神经系统评估，包括定向力、意识水平和扑翼样震颤。

options.en: Attribute the confusion to residual procedural sedation and defer lactulose until the next routine assessment.
options.zh: 将意识混乱归因于操作后残余镇静，推迟乳果糖至下一次常规评估。

options.en: Closely monitor urine output and creatinine because SBP with AKI raises concern for hepatorenal syndrome.
options.zh: 密切监测尿量和肌酐，因为SBP合并AKI提示肝肾综合征风险。

options.en: Give additional PRBCs to raise hemoglobin above 8 g/dL because the patient looks worse.
options.zh: 因患者看起来更差而追加输注红细胞，使血红蛋白超过8 g/dL。

correct.en: The hemorrhage appears controlled, but the patient has new hepatic encephalopathy, SBP by ascitic PMN count, and worsening renal function. The nursing priority shifts to treating encephalopathy, communicating SBP results, and tracking neurologic and renal trajectories.
correct.zh: 出血似乎已控制，但患者出现新的肝性脑病、腹水PMN计数符合SBP，以及肾功能恶化。护理重点转向治疗脑病、报告SBP结果，并追踪神经和肾功能趋势。

byChoice.en: Confusion, somnolence, asterixis, and ammonia 124 µmol/L support hepatic encephalopathy; lactulose and rifaximin are the ordered therapies.
byChoice.zh: 意识混乱、嗜睡、扑翼样震颤和氨124 µmol/L支持肝性脑病；乳果糖和利福昔明是医嘱治疗。

byChoice.en: Serial neurological assessment shows whether encephalopathy is improving or progressing despite therapy.
byChoice.zh: 连续神经系统评估可判断脑病在治疗后是改善还是进展。

byChoice.en: The stable hemoglobin of 7.6 g/dL and absence of new hematemesis argue against rebleeding; transfusion above target would not treat the current problem.
byChoice.zh: 血红蛋白7.6 g/dL稳定且无再次呕血，不支持再出血；超目标输血不能治疗当前问题。

byChoice.en: Creatinine is rising and urine output is falling in the setting of SBP, which raises concern for hepatorenal syndrome physiology.
byChoice.zh: 在SBP背景下肌酐上升且尿量下降，提示肝肾综合征相关风险。

byChoice.en: The decline occurs more than 12 hours after sedation, after the patient had been oriented, and includes new asterixis and marked hyperammonemia; deferring treatment is unsafe.
byChoice.zh: 意识下降发生在镇静12小时以上之后，且患者曾清醒定向，同时出现新的扑翼样震颤和明显高氨血症；推迟治疗不安全。

byChoice.en: Ascitic PMN 484 cells/µL exceeds the case threshold of 250 cells/µL, so SBP must be communicated and treatment reassessed.
byChoice.zh: 腹水PMN 484 cells/µL超过本病例250 cells/µL阈值，必须报告SBP并重新评估治疗。

testTakingStrategy.en: When a patient worsens after the initial emergency is controlled, ask whether the new data show a complication rather than failure of the first treatment.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 初始急症控制后患者恶化时，要判断新资料是否提示并发症，而不是简单认为第一次治疗失败。

glossary.defZh: 肝功能衰竭或门体分流导致毒素积聚，引起意识和神经功能改变。
无明确腹腔感染源的腹水感染，肝硬化腹水患者风险较高。
手腕伸展时出现的不规则扑翼样抖动，常见于肝性脑病。
晚期肝病和门静脉高压背景下发生的功能性肾衰竭。

correct.en: This case moves from recognition of presumed variceal hemorrhage, through shock-pattern analysis and variceal-specific stabilization, to post-banding surveillance and recognition of downstream complications. The correct judgment arc is to treat massive hematemesis in a cirrhotic patient with portal hypertension as variceal bleeding; support perfusion without over-transfusing; continue vasoactive therapy and antibiotic prophylaxis; prepare for definitive endoscopic banding; then monitor for rebleeding, hepatic encephalopathy, SBP, and renal deterioration. By Stage 3, stable hemoglobin and normalized lactate argue against recurrent hemorrhagic shock, while confusion with asterixis, ammonia 124 µmol/L, ascitic PMN 484 cells/µL, rising creatinine, and oliguria identify hepatic encephalopathy, SBP, and possible hepatorenal physiology as the new priorities.
correct.zh: 本病例的临床判断路径从识别疑似静脉曲张出血开始，经过休克模式分析和静脉曲张出血的特异性稳定措施，再进入套扎后监测和下游并发症识别。正确思路是：肝硬化合并门静脉高压患者出现大量呕血时，先按静脉曲张出血处理；支持灌注但避免过度输血；继续血管活性药物和预防性抗生素；准备内镜套扎这一关键止血措施；随后监测再出血、肝性脑病、SBP和肾功能恶化。到第3阶段，血红蛋白稳定和乳酸恢复不支持复发性失血性休克；而意识混乱伴扑翼样震颤、氨124 µmol/L、腹水PMN 484 cells/µL、肌酐升高和少尿，则提示肝性脑病、SBP以及可能的肝肾综合征相关生理成为新优先事项。

testTakingStrategy.en: For unfolding cases, do not anchor on the first emergency after it has improved. Re-rank priorities whenever new trend data appear.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 做展开式病例时，不要在初始急症改善后仍锚定在最初问题上。每当出现新的趋势资料，都要重新排序优先事项。

glossary.defZh: 门静脉高压导致曲张静脉破裂，引起大量上消化道出血。
以较低血红蛋白目标进行输血，避免过度容量负荷和相关风险。
用套扎环机械性闭合出血食管静脉曲张。
肝硬化腹水中无明确腹腔来源的感染，腹水中性粒细胞升高是关键诊断线索。
肝病导致氨等毒素清除不足，引起认知、意识和神经肌肉改变。

stem.en: Review the client record and answer the case-study items.
stem.zh: 请查看患者病历，并回答本病例题组。

stem.en: A 55-year-old man with decompensated cirrhosis was admitted for acute esophageal variceal hemorrhage. Endoscopic band ligation achieved hemostasis, and his hemoglobin is stable at 7.6 g/dL with no further hematemesis. Twelve to 24 hours later, he is confused and somnolent, has asterixis, ammonia has risen to 124 µmol/L, creatinine has risen to 1.8 mg/dL with urine output 15 mL/hr, and diagnostic paracentesis shows ascitic neutrophils 484 cells/µL. Complete the bow-tie by selecting the most likely condition, two priority nursing actions, and two parameters to monitor.
stem.zh: 一名55岁失代偿性肝硬化患者因急性食管静脉曲张出血入院。内镜套扎已成功止血，血红蛋白稳定在7.6 g/dL且无再次呕血。12至24小时后，他出现意识混乱和嗜睡，有扑翼样震颤，氨升至124 µmol/L，肌酐升至1.8 mg/dL且尿量15 mL/hr，诊断性腹腔穿刺显示腹水中性粒细胞484 cells/µL。请完成蝴蝶结题：选择最可能的状况、两个优先护理行动以及两个需要监测的参数。

correct.en: The best synthesis is hepatic encephalopathy with SBP and renal deterioration as major precipitants and complications. The hemorrhage markers are stable, while the neurological decline, asterixis, hyperammonemia, ascitic neutrophil count above the case threshold, rising creatinine, and oliguria point to encephalopathy, infection, and hepatorenal-risk physiology.
correct.zh: 最佳综合判断是肝性脑病，同时SBP和肾功能恶化是重要诱因和并发问题。出血指标稳定，而神经状态下降、扑翼样震颤、高氨血症、腹水中性粒细胞超过本病例阈值、肌酐上升和少尿共同指向脑病、感染和肝肾综合征风险相关生理。

byChoice.en: Correct: confusion, somnolence, asterixis, ammonia 124 µmol/L, intraluminal blood, SBP, and AKI fit hepatic encephalopathy.
byChoice.zh: 正确：意识混乱、嗜睡、扑翼样震颤、氨124 µmol/L、肠腔内血液、SBP和AKI符合肝性脑病。

byChoice.en: Incorrect: he was oriented after the procedure, the decline occurred more than 12 hours later, and new asterixis/hyperammonemia point away from sedation.
byChoice.zh: 错误：患者术后曾清醒定向，意识下降发生在12小时以后，新的扑翼样震颤和高氨血症不支持残余镇静。

byChoice.en: Incorrect: stable hemoglobin, no new hematemesis, normalized lactate, improved HR, and normalized BP argue against recurrent hemorrhagic shock.
byChoice.zh: 错误：血红蛋白稳定、无再次呕血、乳酸恢复、心率改善和血压正常，不支持复发性失血性休克。

byChoice.en: Correct: these ordered therapies reduce intestinal ammonia production/absorption and directly treat hepatic encephalopathy.
byChoice.zh: 正确：这些医嘱治疗可降低肠道氨产生/吸收，直接治疗肝性脑病。

byChoice.en: Correct: ascitic neutrophils 484 cells/µL meet the case SBP threshold; SBP can worsen encephalopathy and precipitate renal failure, so prompt escalation is needed.
byChoice.zh: 正确：腹水中性粒细胞484 cells/µL达到本病例SBP阈值；SBP可加重脑病并诱发肾衰竭，因此需要及时升级处理。

byChoice.en: Incorrect: the current deterioration is not explained by recurrent bleeding, and hemoglobin is stable within the stated restrictive target range.
byChoice.zh: 错误：当前恶化不能用再出血解释，血红蛋白稳定且在本病例限制性目标范围内。

byChoice.en: Incorrect: deferring treatment ignores the new asterixis, hyperammonemia, and SBP and risks progression of encephalopathy.
byChoice.zh: 错误：推迟治疗会忽略新的扑翼样震颤、高氨血症和SBP，并有脑病进展风险。

byChoice.en: Correct: serial neurological findings show whether encephalopathy is improving with lactulose/rifaximin or worsening toward coma.
byChoice.zh: 正确：连续神经系统表现可显示脑病在乳果糖/利福昔明治疗后是改善还是进展至昏迷。

byChoice.en: Correct: rising creatinine and falling urine output in SBP are key markers for hepatorenal-risk physiology and treatment response.
byChoice.zh: 正确：SBP背景下肌酐上升和尿量下降是肝肾综合征风险及治疗反应的关键指标。

byChoice.en: Incorrect: the admission blood alcohol level was undetectable and does not track the current encephalopathy/SBP/renal trajectory.
byChoice.zh: 错误：入院血液酒精浓度不可测，不能追踪当前脑病、SBP或肾功能趋势。

byChoice.en: Incorrect as the primary current monitor: lactate has normalized after hemorrhage control and does not best track encephalopathy severity or hepatorenal-risk progression.
byChoice.zh: 作为当前主要监测指标不正确：出血控制后乳酸已恢复，不能最好地追踪脑病严重程度或肝肾综合征风险进展。

testTakingStrategy.en: In a bow-tie, the correct middle condition must explain the cues and make the actions and monitoring parameters make sense together.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 蝴蝶结题中，正确的中间状况必须能解释线索，并让行动和监测指标在逻辑上连成一体。

glossary.defZh: 要求把最可能状况、优先行动和监测参数连接成一个临床判断链的题型。
肝病导致的意识、认知和神经肌肉功能改变。
自发性细菌性腹膜炎，肝硬化腹水患者的严重感染并发症。
急性肾损伤，表现为肌酐上升或尿量下降。

tokens.en: Recurrent hypovolemic shock with cerebral hypoperfusion
tokens.zh: 复发性低血容量性休克伴脑灌注不足

tokens.en: Hepatic encephalopathy precipitated by GI blood load, SBP, and AKI
tokens.zh: 由消化道血液负荷、SBP和AKI诱发的肝性脑病

tokens.en: Residual procedural sedation after endoscopy
tokens.zh: 内镜后残余镇静作用

tokens.en: Transfuse additional PRBCs to raise hemoglobin above 8 g/dL because mental status worsened.
tokens.zh: 因意识状态恶化而追加红细胞，使血红蛋白超过8 g/dL。

tokens.en: Administer lactulose as ordered and rifaximin every 12 hours.
tokens.zh: 按医嘱给予乳果糖，并每12小时给予利福昔明。

tokens.en: Notify the provider of SBP-confirming paracentesis results and anticipate albumin/antibiotic reassessment.
tokens.zh: 将腹水结果符合SBP及时通知医护团队，并预期评估白蛋白和抗生素方案。

tokens.en: Document likely residual sedation and defer encephalopathy treatment until the next routine assessment.
tokens.zh: 记录为可能残余镇静，并推迟肝性脑病治疗至下一次常规评估。

tokens.en: Urine output and serum creatinine trend
tokens.zh: 尿量和血清肌酐趋势

tokens.en: Serial neurological assessments: level of consciousness, orientation, asterixis, ability to follow commands
tokens.zh: 连续神经系统评估：意识水平、定向力、扑翼样震颤、执行指令能力

tokens.en: Blood alcohol level
tokens.zh: 血液酒精浓度

tokens.en: Lactate level as the primary marker of the current problem
tokens.zh: 将乳酸作为当前问题的主要监测指标

questions.topic: Postpartum hemorrhage due to uterine atony

title.en: Postpartum hemorrhage from uterine atony in a grand multiparous client with pregnancy-induced hypertension
title.zh: 妊娠期高血压经产妇因子宫收缩乏力发生的产后出血

summary.en: A 32-year-old G5P5 client is one hour postpartum after a vaginal birth of a 4.2 kg infant. She has pregnancy-induced hypertension treated with labetalol and mild intermittent asthma. She develops heavy bleeding, a boggy displaced fundus, tachycardia, and hypotension relative to her hypertensive baseline.
summary.zh: 一名 32 岁 G5P5 产妇在阴道分娩 4.2 kg 新生儿后 1 小时处于产后恢复期。她有妊娠期高血压，使用拉贝洛尔治疗，并有轻度间歇性哮喘。她出现大量出血、子宫底偏移且松软、心动过速，以及相对高血压基线明显下降的血压。

content.en: G5P5, one hour postpartum after vaginal birth of a 4.2 kg infant. Second stage lasted 3 hours; oxytocin augmentation was used during first stage. Placenta delivered intact and appeared complete. Pregnancy-induced hypertension was diagnosed at 34 weeks and treated with labetalol 200 mg twice daily. History includes mild intermittent asthma. No bleeding disorder, prior PPH, or uterine surgery. Admission BP 148/94 mmHg. Admission Hgb 11.8 g/dL, Hct 35.2%. Blood type O-positive; type and screen sent on admission. Oxytocin 20 units in 1 L LR has been infusing for about 50 minutes after placental delivery.
content.zh: G5P5，阴道分娩 4.2 kg 新生儿后 1 小时。第二产程持续 3 小时；第一产程使用催产素加强宫缩。胎盘娩出完整，检查外观完整。34 周诊断妊娠期高血压，使用拉贝洛尔 200 mg 每日两次。既往有轻度间歇性哮喘。无出血性疾病、既往产后出血或子宫手术史。入院血压 148/94 mmHg。入院 Hgb 11.8 g/dL，Hct 35.2%。血型 O 阳性；入院已送血型筛查。胎盘娩出后已按医嘱输注催产素 20 units 加入 1 L LR，约 50 分钟。

content.en: Client says she feels 'dizzy and wet.' She is pale, diaphoretic, alert, oriented, and anxious. Underpads show a large amount of blood; the perineal pad placed 20 minutes ago is saturated. Vital signs: T 36.8 °C, HR 118, BP 90/62 mmHg, RR 22, SpO2 97% on room air. Uterus is two fingerbreadths above the umbilicus, deviated to the right, and boggy; it does not stay firm after massage. Lochia is heavy with dark-red flow and several small clots. Repaired second-degree perineal laceration has no active bleeding and no visible hematoma. Bladder is palpable above the symphysis pubis. Skin is cool and clammy; capillary refill 3 seconds. Estimated blood loss is 600 mL and visibly increasing.
content.zh: 患者说自己“头晕，而且感觉很湿”。她面色苍白、出汗，意识清醒、定向力正常但焦虑。护理垫上有大量血液；20 分钟前更换的会阴垫已饱和。生命体征：T 36.8 °C，HR 118，BP 90/62 mmHg，RR 22，室内空气 SpO2 97%。子宫底位于脐上两横指，向右偏移且松软；按摩后不能维持坚硬。恶露量多，暗红色流出并有数个小血块。已缝合的二度会阴裂伤无活动性出血，也未见血肿。耻骨联合上方可触及膀胱。皮肤湿冷；毛细血管再充盈 3 秒。估计失血量 600 mL，并且肉眼可见仍在增加。

content.en: Hgb 11.8 g/dL, Hct 35.2%, platelets 188,000/µL, fibrinogen 410 mg/dL, INR 1.0, aPTT 28 sec. Sodium 138 mEq/L, potassium 3.9 mEq/L, creatinine 0.7 mg/dL, glucose 92 mg/dL. Urinalysis: 1+ protein, otherwise unremarkable.
content.zh: Hgb 11.8 g/dL，Hct 35.2%，血小板 188,000/µL，纤维蛋白原 410 mg/dL，INR 1.0，aPTT 28 秒。钠 138 mEq/L，钾 3.9 mEq/L，肌酐 0.7 mg/dL，血糖 92 mg/dL。尿检：蛋白 1+，其余无明显异常。

title.zh: 第 1 阶段：初始出血处理
第 1 阶段：初始出血处理

content.en: The nurse begins external fundal massage with lower uterine support and calls for assistance. Straight catheterization drains 450 mL of clear urine; the uterus descends to the umbilicus but remains boggy. Oxytocin is confirmed infusing and increased per standing order to infuse the remaining volume over 30 minutes. Two 16-gauge peripheral IVs are placed; warmed LR is hung wide open. Quantitative blood loss is now 800 mL. Vital signs: HR 124, BP 86/58, RR 24, SpO2 96% on room air. The provider is called to bedside.
content.zh: 护士开始在下方支托子宫的同时进行外部子宫底按摩，并呼叫协助。一次性导尿排出清亮尿液 450 mL；子宫下降至脐水平但仍松软。确认催产素正在输注，并按常规医嘱提高速度，在 30 分钟内输完剩余液体。置入两条 16G 外周静脉通路；温热 LR 全速开放。定量失血现为 800 mL。生命体征：HR 124，BP 86/58，RR 24，室内空气 SpO2 96%。已呼叫医师到床旁。

title.en: Stage 2: Persistent atony and medication selection
title.zh: 第 2 阶段：子宫收缩乏力持续及药物选择

title.en: Stage 2: Persistent atony and medication selection
title.zh: 第 2 阶段：子宫收缩乏力持续及药物选择

content.en: Despite massage and increased oxytocin, the uterus intermittently firms then relaxes within seconds. QBL is 1,200 mL. Vital signs: HR 132, BP 80/52, RR 26, SpO2 95% on room air. The client is confused and markedly pale with capillary refill 4 seconds. The provider rules out retained placental fragments and unrepaired cervical/vaginal lacerations. Available uterotonics are methylergonovine 0.2 mg IM, misoprostol 800 mcg rectally, and carboprost 250 mcg IM. Stat labs: Hgb 8.1 g/dL, Hct 24.3%, platelets 162,000/µL, fibrinogen 280 mg/dL, INR 1.1, aPTT 30 sec. Type and crossmatch for 2 units PRBC is sent. The unit protocol orders tranexamic acid 1 g IV over 10 minutes within 3 hours of birth for PPH not responding to first-line uterotonics.
content.zh: 尽管持续按摩并增加催产素输注，子宫仍间歇性变硬后数秒内又松弛。定量失血 1,200 mL。生命体征：HR 132，BP 80/52，RR 26，室内空气 SpO2 95%。患者意识混乱、明显苍白，毛细血管再充盈 4 秒。医师排除胎盘碎片残留及未修补的宫颈/阴道裂伤。可用宫缩药包括甲基麦角新碱 0.2 mg IM、米索前列醇 800 mcg 经直肠给药、卡前列素 250 mcg IM。急查化验：Hgb 8.1 g/dL，Hct 24.3%，血小板 162,000/µL，纤维蛋白原 280 mg/dL，INR 1.1，aPTT 30 秒。已送 2 单位 PRBC 配血。病区方案医嘱：对一线宫缩药反应不佳的产后出血，在分娩后 3 小时内给予氨甲环酸 1 g IV，10 分钟输注。

title.en: Stage 3: Response evaluation after source control
title.zh: 第 3 阶段：止血源控制后的反应评估

title.en: Stage 3: Response evaluation after source control
title.zh: 第 3 阶段：止血源控制后的反应评估

content.en: Misoprostol 800 mcg was given rectally, tranexamic acid 1 g IV was infused over 10 minutes, and the provider performed aggressive bimanual compression. The uterus is now firm at the umbilicus. Lochia is moderate dark red without clots. QBL has plateaued at 1,450 mL with no further active accumulation for 15 minutes. Vital signs: HR 112, BP 94/60, RR 20, SpO2 97% on 2 L nasal cannula. The client is alert and oriented but fatigued and mildly dizzy with repositioning. The first PRBC unit is infusing through a dedicated large-bore IV; a second unit is ordered. Repeat labs: Hgb 7.4 g/dL, Hct 22.1%, platelets 148,000/µL, fibrinogen 240 mg/dL, INR 1.2, aPTT 32 sec. Foley output is 25 mL/hr of concentrated amber urine. Fundal checks continue every 15 minutes.
content.zh: 已给予米索前列醇 800 mcg 经直肠给药，氨甲环酸 1 g IV 10 分钟输注，医师进行了积极双手子宫压迫。现在子宫坚硬，位于脐水平。恶露为中等量暗红色，无血块。定量失血停留在 1,450 mL，15 分钟内无进一步活动性增加。生命体征：HR 112，BP 94/60，RR 20，鼻导管 2 L 下 SpO2 97%。患者清醒、定向力正常，但疲乏，变换体位时仍轻度头晕。第 1 单位 PRBC 正通过专用大口径 IV 输注；已医嘱随后输注第 2 单位。复查化验：Hgb 7.4 g/dL，Hct 22.1%，血小板 148,000/µL，纤维蛋白原 240 mg/dL，INR 1.2，aPTT 32 秒。Foley 尿量 25 mL/hr，为浓缩琥珀色尿。继续每 15 分钟检查子宫底。

stem.en: Highlight the assessment findings that require immediate follow-up for postpartum hemorrhage from uterine atony.
stem.zh: 请标出需要立即针对子宫收缩乏力性产后出血进行处理的评估发现。

segments.en: Temperature 36.8 °C.
Heart rate 118 beats/min.
segments.zh: 心率 118 次/分。

segments.en: Blood pressure 90/62 mmHg, down from her hypertensive admission baseline of 148/94 mmHg.
segments.zh: 血压 90/62 mmHg，低于入院时 148/94 mmHg 的妊娠期高血压基线。

segments.en: SpO2 97% on room air.
segments.zh: 室内空气下 SpO2 97%。

segments.en: The uterus is two fingerbreadths above the umbilicus, deviated to the right, and boggy.
segments.zh: 子宫底位于脐上两横指，向右偏移，触之松软。

segments.en: It does not stay firm after gentle massage.
segments.zh: 轻柔按摩后子宫不能持续变硬。

segments.en: Lochia is heavy with a steady dark-red flow and several small clots.
segments.zh: 恶露量多，持续暗红色流出，并有数个小血块。

segments.en: The repaired second-degree perineal laceration has no active bleeding and no visible hematoma.
segments.zh: 已缝合的二度会阴裂伤无活动性出血，也未见血肿。

segments.en: The bladder is palpable above the symphysis pubis.
segments.zh: 耻骨联合上方可触及膀胱。

segments.en: Skin is cool and clammy with capillary refill of 3 seconds.
segments.zh: 皮肤湿冷，毛细血管再充盈时间为 3 秒。

segments.en: Estimated blood loss is 600 mL and visibly increasing.
segments.zh: 估计失血量为 600 mL，且肉眼可见仍在增加。

segments.en: She denies chest pain or shortness of breath.
segments.zh: 她否认胸痛或气短。

correct.en: The key cues are a boggy displaced uterus that cannot maintain tone, heavy lochia with clots, blood loss already at 600 mL and increasing, tachycardia, hypotension relative to a hypertensive baseline, poor peripheral perfusion, and a palpable bladder that can worsen uterine displacement. Normal temperature and oxygen saturation do not define the problem, and the intact perineal repair helps narrow the source away from a laceration.
correct.zh: 关键线索包括子宫底偏移且松软、不能维持张力，恶露量多伴血块，失血量已达 600 mL 且仍在增加，心动过速，相对于妊娠期高血压基线明显下降的血压，外周灌注差，以及可触及的膀胱充盈（可加重子宫偏移）。体温和血氧正常不能说明当前问题；会阴修补处完整有助于把出血来源从裂伤转向子宫。

byChoice.en: A normal temperature does not define this acute hemorrhage.
byChoice.zh: 体温正常，不能说明当前急性出血问题。

byChoice.en: Tachycardia is an early sign of volume loss and shock in postpartum hemorrhage.
byChoice.zh: 心动过速是产后出血导致容量不足和休克的早期表现。

byChoice.en: The absolute BP is low, and the drop from a hypertensive baseline makes the hemodynamic compromise more severe.
byChoice.zh: 血压本身偏低，且相对妊娠期高血压基线明显下降，提示血流动力学受损更严重。

byChoice.en: Normal oxygen saturation does not rule out hemorrhagic shock and is not the defining cue here.
byChoice.zh: 血氧饱和度正常不能排除失血性休克，也不是本题的关键线索。

byChoice.en: A boggy, displaced uterus is the hallmark cue for uterine atony and impaired contraction.
byChoice.zh: 子宫底偏移且松软是子宫收缩乏力、收缩无效的标志性线索。

byChoice.en: Failure to sustain tone after massage shows that atony is ongoing.
byChoice.zh: 按摩后不能维持张力说明子宫收缩乏力仍在持续。

byChoice.en: Heavy lochia with clots supports ongoing uterine bleeding from the placental site.
byChoice.zh: 恶露量多并有血块，支持胎盘附着部位仍在子宫性出血。

byChoice.en: This is relevant because it helps rule away a laceration source, but it is not itself an abnormal hemorrhage cue needing immediate correction.
byChoice.zh: 这一正常发现有助于排除裂伤来源，但它本身不是需要立即处理的异常出血线索。

byChoice.en: A distended bladder can displace the uterus and prevent effective contraction, worsening atony.
byChoice.zh: 膀胱充盈会使子宫偏移并妨碍有效收缩，从而加重子宫收缩乏力。

byChoice.en: Cool clammy skin and delayed capillary refill are peripheral perfusion cues of hypovolemia.
byChoice.zh: 皮肤湿冷和毛细血管再充盈延迟提示低血容量导致外周灌注不足。

byChoice.en: Blood loss of 600 mL after a vaginal birth meets the traditional PPH threshold and is still increasing.
byChoice.zh: 阴道分娩后失血 600 mL 已达到传统产后出血阈值，并且仍在增加。

byChoice.en: Absence of chest pain or dyspnea is reassuring but does not address the hemorrhage source.
byChoice.zh: 无胸痛或气短较为 reassuring，但不能说明出血来源或严重程度。

testTakingStrategy.en: In early postpartum bleeding, first connect uterine tone, lochia, blood-loss amount, and perfusion signs. Compare vital signs with the client's baseline, not just the normal range.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 早期产后出血题先把子宫张力、恶露、失血量和灌注表现联系起来；生命体征要和该患者的基线比较，而不只看正常范围。

glossary.defZh: 产后子宫触之柔软而不是坚硬，提示收缩不良。
产后从子宫经阴道排出的血液和组织。
通过称重或收集血液来测量失血量，而不是仅凭目测估计。

questions.topic: Postpartum hemorrhage due to uterine atony

stem.en: Complete the clinical reasoning statement using the available Stage 1 findings.
stem.zh: 根据第 1 阶段可获得的资料，完成临床推理陈述。

correct.en: A boggy uterus that will not maintain tone after massage identifies uterine atony as the primary mechanism. The intact laceration repair argues against a traumatic lower-tract source. Retained tissue is possible early in a PPH workup, but the placenta was inspected as complete and the defining cue is uterine relaxation. Inversion is unlikely because the fundus remains palpable in the abdomen.
correct.zh: 按摩后不能维持张力的松软子宫指向子宫收缩乏力。会阴裂伤修补处完整，不支持下生殖道创伤性出血。胎盘残留在产后出血评估中可以考虑，但胎盘已检查完整，且决定性线索是子宫松弛。子宫底仍可在腹部触及，因此子宫内翻可能性低。

byChoice.en: Correct: the uterus is boggy and does not maintain tone.
byChoice.zh: 正确：子宫松软，不能维持张力。

byChoice.en: A laceration usually causes persistent bleeding with a firm uterus; the repair here is intact and not actively bleeding.
byChoice.zh: 裂伤通常表现为子宫坚硬但仍持续出血；本例修补处完整且无活动性出血。

byChoice.en: Retained tissue can cause atony, but the placenta was documented intact and no retained-fragment cue is present at Stage 1.
byChoice.zh: 胎盘残留可导致子宫收缩不良，但本例胎盘记录为完整，第 1 阶段没有残留组织线索。

byChoice.en: Inversion would usually make the fundus absent from its expected abdominal position or visible/protruding vaginally.
byChoice.zh: 子宫内翻通常表现为腹部预期位置触不到子宫底，或阴道内可见/突出肿块。

byChoice.en: Correct: inability to sustain uterine tone is the central cue for atony.
byChoice.zh: 正确：不能维持子宫张力是收缩乏力的核心线索。

byChoice.en: This helps rule away laceration but is not the best positive evidence for atony.
byChoice.zh: 这有助于排除裂伤，但不是支持子宫收缩乏力的最佳阳性证据。

byChoice.en: Blood type and antibody screen matter for transfusion planning, not identifying the hemorrhage source.
byChoice.zh: 血型和抗体筛查对输血准备重要，但不能判断出血来源。

byChoice.en: Proteinuria supports the hypertensive pregnancy history, not the immediate cause of bleeding.
byChoice.zh: 蛋白尿支持妊娠期高血压病史，但不是当前出血原因。

byChoice.en: Correct: a palpable abdominal fundus makes inversion unlikely.
byChoice.zh: 正确：腹部可触及子宫底，使子宫内翻可能性降低。

byChoice.en: Clots support hemorrhage but do not distinguish inversion from other causes.
byChoice.zh: 血块支持出血，但不能区分子宫内翻和其他原因。

byChoice.en: Oxytocin exposure is relevant to labor history but does not rule out inversion.
byChoice.zh: 催产素使用与产程有关，但不能排除子宫内翻。

byChoice.en: Macrosomia is a risk factor for atony, not a direct rule-out for inversion.
byChoice.zh: 巨大儿是子宫收缩乏力的风险因素，但不是直接排除子宫内翻的依据。

testTakingStrategy.en: For PPH differentials, ask whether the uterus is firm or boggy. Boggy points to tone; firm with bleeding points more toward trauma or tissue.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 区分产后出血原因时先问子宫是坚硬还是松软。松软指向“张力”问题；子宫坚硬但仍出血则更偏向创伤或组织残留。

glossary.defZh: 产后子宫不能充分收缩以压迫胎盘附着部位血管。
产后子宫翻转内陷的一种罕见急症。
胎盘碎片残留在子宫内，可妨碍子宫收缩并导致出血。

questions.topic: Postpartum hemorrhage due to uterine atony

clozeStem.en: The most likely cause of the hemorrhage is {{dd_condition}} because {{dd_best_evidence}}. Uterine inversion is unlikely because {{dd_inversion_ruleout}}.
clozeStem.zh: 最可能的出血原因是 {{dd_condition}}，因为 {{dd_best_evidence}}。子宫内翻的可能性较低，因为 {{dd_inversion_ruleout}}。

options.en: uterine inversion
options.zh: 子宫内翻

options.en: retained placental tissue
options.zh: 胎盘组织残留

options.en: uterine atony
options.zh: 子宫收缩乏力

options.en: cervical or vaginal laceration
options.zh: 宫颈或阴道裂伤

options.en: the boggy fundus briefly firms with massage but immediately relaxes
options.zh: 子宫底松软，按摩后短暂变硬但很快又松弛

options.en: the client is O-positive with a negative antibody screen
options.zh: 患者 O 型 Rh 阳性且抗体筛查阴性

options.en: the urinalysis shows 1+ protein
options.zh: 尿检显示蛋白 1+

options.en: the repaired second-degree laceration is intact
options.zh: 二度裂伤修补处完整

options.en: several small clots are present
options.zh: 可见数个小血块

options.en: the fundus is palpable above the umbilicus
options.zh: 子宫底可在脐上触及

options.en: the infant weighed 4.2 kg
options.zh: 新生儿体重 4.2 kg

options.en: oxytocin was used during labor
options.zh: 产程中使用过催产素

stem.en: The provider orders a second uterotonic. Which medication should the nurse administer from the available unit options?
stem.zh: 医嘱追加第二种宫缩药。护士应从病区可用药物中给予哪一种？

options.en: Administer carboprost tromethamine 250 mcg IM.
options.zh: 给予卡前列素氨丁三醇 250 mcg IM。

options.en: Administer methylergonovine 0.2 mg IM.
options.zh: 给予甲基麦角新碱 0.2 mg IM。

options.en: Administer misoprostol 800 mcg rectally.
options.zh: 给予米索前列醇 800 mcg 经直肠给药。

options.en: Hold all additional uterotonics until the repeat CBC and coagulation panel result.
options.zh: 在复查 CBC 和凝血功能结果出来前暂停所有追加宫缩药。

correct.en: Misoprostol is the safe second-line uterotonic in this client because methylergonovine is contraindicated by pregnancy-induced hypertension and carboprost is unsafe with asthma. Current hemorrhagic hypotension does not remove the methylergonovine contraindication.
correct.zh: 本例中米索前列醇是安全的二线宫缩药，因为妊娠期高血压禁用甲基麦角新碱，哮喘病史使卡前列素不安全。当前因失血导致的低血压并不能解除甲基麦角新碱的禁忌。

byChoice.en: Correct: misoprostol treats atony and avoids the hypertension contraindication of methylergonovine and the asthma risk of carboprost.
byChoice.zh: 正确：米索前列醇可治疗子宫收缩乏力，同时避开甲基麦角新碱的高血压禁忌和卡前列素的哮喘风险。

byChoice.en: Carboprost should be avoided in asthma because it can trigger bronchospasm.
byChoice.zh: 卡前列素应避免用于哮喘患者，因为可诱发支气管痉挛。

byChoice.en: The client is unstable with ongoing hemorrhage; uterotonic treatment must not wait for labs when the atony source is clear.
byChoice.zh: 患者不稳定且仍在出血；当子宫收缩乏力来源明确时，不应等化验结果才使用宫缩药。

byChoice.en: Methylergonovine is contraindicated with pregnancy-induced hypertension because vasoconstriction can cause severe rebound hypertension once volume is restored.
byChoice.zh: 甲基麦角新碱禁用于妊娠期高血压患者，因为补足容量后血管收缩作用可能导致严重反跳性高血压。

testTakingStrategy.en: When medication choices all treat the same problem, screen each option for patient-specific contraindications before choosing the strongest drug.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 当多个药物都能治疗同一问题时，先根据患者个体禁忌证筛选，而不是直接选择作用最强的药。

glossary.defZh: 促进子宫收缩的药物。
一种具有血管收缩作用的宫缩药；高血压相关疾病中不安全。
一种前列腺素类宫缩药，可加重哮喘患者支气管痉挛。

questions.topic: Postpartum hemorrhage due to uterine atony

stem.en: Which actions should occur now as part of the coordinated team response? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 此时哪些措施应作为团队协作反应立即进行？选择所有适用项。

options.en: Have another team member send the type and crossmatch specimen immediately.
options.zh: 由另一名团队成员立即送检配血标本。

options.en: Maintain continuous external fundal massage or assist with bimanual compression.
options.zh: 持续进行外部子宫底按摩，或协助双手压迫子宫。

options.en: Stop fundal massage so the primary nurse can draw the laboratory specimens first.
options.zh: 停止子宫底按摩，让责任护士先抽取化验标本。

options.en: Start tranexamic acid 1 g IV over 10 minutes per the PPH protocol after uterotonic administration is underway.
options.zh: 宫缩药给药开始后，按产后出血方案给予氨甲环酸 1 g IV，10 分钟输注。

options.en: Continue rapid warmed IV fluid resuscitation through large-bore access.
options.zh: 通过大口径静脉通路继续快速输入温热 IV 液体复苏。

options.en: Administer the selected second uterotonic without delay.
options.zh: 立即给予已选择的第二种宫缩药。

correct.en: This is not a rigid ordered sequence. The team must maintain source control with massage/compression and a safe uterotonic while restoring circulating volume, starting ordered TXA within the protocol window, and preparing blood products through another team member. Lab and blood-bank tasks should not interrupt uterine compression.
correct.zh: 这不是严格的单线顺序题。团队必须同时通过按摩/压迫和安全宫缩药控制出血来源，恢复循环容量，在方案时间窗内启动已医嘱的氨甲环酸，并由其他团队成员准备血制品。化验和血库任务不能中断子宫压迫。

byChoice.en: Stopping compression for labs allows the atonic uterus to refill and bleed; team response prevents this delay.
byChoice.zh: 为了抽血而停止压迫会使松软子宫再次充血出血；团队协作可避免这种延误。

byChoice.en: Correct: a second safe uterotonic directly treats the atony causing the hemorrhage.
byChoice.zh: 正确：安全的第二种宫缩药直接治疗造成出血的子宫收缩乏力。

byChoice.en: Correct: source control must be maintained continuously while the uterus is atonic.
byChoice.zh: 正确：子宫收缩乏力时必须持续维持止血源控制。

byChoice.en: Correct: blood preparation is urgent, but it should be delegated to another team member so massage and resuscitation continue.
byChoice.zh: 正确：备血很紧急，但应由其他团队成员完成，以便持续按摩和复苏。

byChoice.en: Correct: TXA is ordered by protocol for PPH not responding to first-line uterotonics and should not be delayed once source-control actions are underway.
byChoice.zh: 正确：对于一线宫缩药反应不佳的产后出血，方案已医嘱使用氨甲环酸；在止血源控制进行中的同时不应延误。

byChoice.en: Correct: rapid volume resuscitation treats hypotension and poor perfusion while bleeding control proceeds.
byChoice.zh: 正确：在止血同时快速补充容量，以处理低血压和灌注不足。

testTakingStrategy.en: When a hemorrhage item lists many tasks, separate source control and resuscitation from tasks that can be assigned to helpers. Do not convert concurrent priorities into a fake sequence.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 出血题列出多项任务时，先区分“止血源控制和复苏”与可交给他人完成的任务；不要把并行优先事项误当成严格顺序。

glossary.defZh: 一种抗纤溶辅助止血药；不是宫缩药。
在进行进一步治疗时用双手压迫子宫以减少出血。
血库为输注相容血液所做的检测。

questions.topic: Postpartum hemorrhage due to uterine atony

stem.en: Classify each Stage 3 finding as evidence of early stabilization or as a finding that still requires close monitoring/continued concern.
stem.zh: 请将第 3 阶段每项发现分类为“早期稳定证据”或“仍需严密监测/持续关注”。

rows.en: Uterus is firm and contracted at the umbilicus.
rows.zh: 子宫坚硬收缩，位于脐水平。

rows.en: Lochia has decreased to moderate dark-red flow without clots.
rows.zh: 恶露减少为中等量暗红色且无血块。

rows.en: Quantitative blood loss has plateaued at 1,450 mL with no new accumulation for 15 minutes.
rows.zh: 定量失血停留在 1,450 mL，15 分钟内无新增积血。

rows.en: Client is alert, oriented, and no longer confused.
rows.zh: 患者清醒、定向力正常，不再意识混乱。

rows.en: Blood pressure has improved from 80/52 to 94/60 mmHg.
rows.zh: 血压从 80/52 mmHg 改善至 94/60 mmHg。

rows.en: Hemoglobin is 7.4 g/dL after crystalloid resuscitation and transfusion has begun.
rows.zh: 晶体液复苏后血红蛋白为 7.4 g/dL，输血已开始。

rows.en: Fibrinogen has trended down from 410 to 280 to 240 mg/dL.
rows.zh: 纤维蛋白原从 410 降至 280 再降至 240 mg/dL。

rows.en: Foley output is 25 mL/hr of concentrated amber urine.
rows.zh: Foley 尿量为 25 mL/hr，呈浓缩琥珀色。

rows.en: Heart rate is improved but remains 112 beats/min.
rows.zh: 心率较前改善但仍为 112 次/分。

correct.en: The case is improving because uterine tone is restored, lochia is reduced, QBL has plateaued, mentation is clear, and BP is trending up. She is not fully stable: hemoglobin remains severely low, fibrinogen is falling, urine output is below 30 mL/hr, and tachycardia persists, so transfusion and close monitoring must continue.
correct.zh: 本例出现改善，因为子宫张力恢复、恶露减少、定量失血停止上升、意识转清、血压回升。但患者尚未完全稳定：血红蛋白仍很低，纤维蛋白原继续下降，尿量低于 30 mL/hr，心动过速持续，因此必须继续输血和严密监测。

byChoice.en: A firm contracted uterus means the bleeding source is controlled for now.
byChoice.zh: 子宫坚硬收缩说明目前出血来源已得到控制。

byChoice.en: Decreased lochia without clots supports improved uterine control of bleeding.
byChoice.zh: 恶露减少且无血块支持子宫对出血控制改善。

byChoice.en: A plateau in measured blood loss is a direct sign that active accumulation has stopped.
byChoice.zh: 定量失血不再上升直接说明活动性积血已停止。

byChoice.en: Clearing mental status indicates improving cerebral perfusion after resuscitation.
byChoice.zh: 意识转清提示复苏后脑灌注改善。

byChoice.en: The BP is still low but improved from the shock-level reading, supporting early stabilization.
byChoice.zh: 血压仍偏低，但较休克时改善，支持早期稳定。

byChoice.en: This confirms major red-cell loss and need for continued transfusion; with controlled bleeding it does not alone prove rebleeding.
byChoice.zh: 这证实红细胞丢失严重，需要继续输血；在出血受控时，它本身不能证明再出血。

byChoice.en: The value remains above the critical 200 mg/dL threshold but the downward trend requires close monitoring for coagulopathy.
byChoice.zh: 数值仍高于 200 mg/dL 临界值，但下降趋势需要严密监测凝血障碍。

byChoice.en: Urine output below 30 mL/hr indicates ongoing renal hypoperfusion from volume deficit.
byChoice.zh: 尿量低于 30 mL/hr 提示容量不足导致肾灌注仍差。

byChoice.en: Persistent tachycardia means physiologic recovery is incomplete even though the trend is better.
byChoice.zh: 持续心动过速说明生理恢复尚未完成，即使趋势已有改善。

testTakingStrategy.en: In evaluation items, separate source control from systemic recovery. A firm uterus tells you bleeding is controlled; urine output, HR, hemoglobin, and fibrinogen tell you whether shock and coagulopathy are resolving.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 评价类题目要把“出血来源控制”与“全身恢复”分开看。子宫坚硬说明出血受控；尿量、心率、血红蛋白和纤维蛋白原反映休克和凝血状态是否恢复。

glossary.defZh: 尿量减少，成人临床上常以低于 30 mL/hr 作为重要警讯。
一种凝血因子，在严重产科出血中可较早下降。
补液复苏后剩余血液成分被稀释，导致测得浓度下降。

questions.topic: Postpartum hemorrhage due to uterine atony

stem.en: Which findings would signal the need to anticipate escalation to intrauterine balloon tamponade or surgical intervention? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 哪些发现提示需要预期升级至宫腔球囊填塞或手术干预？选择所有适用项。

options.en: Quantitative blood loss resumes climbing despite uterotonics and compression.
options.zh: 尽管已使用宫缩药和压迫，定量失血仍继续上升。

options.en: Urine output remains 25 mL/hr but bleeding remains controlled.
options.zh: 尿量仍为 25 mL/hr，但出血保持受控。

options.en: The uterus becomes boggy again with renewed heavy lochia.
options.zh: 子宫再次变松软，并重新出现大量恶露。

options.en: Fibrinogen falls below 200 mg/dL with ongoing bleeding risk.
options.zh: 纤维蛋白原降至 200 mg/dL 以下，并存在持续出血风险。

options.en: Hemoglobin is 7.4 g/dL while the uterus is firm and QBL is plateaued.
options.zh: 子宫坚硬且定量失血停止上升时，血红蛋白为 7.4 g/dL。

options.en: Heart rate improves from 132 to 112 beats/min.
options.zh: 心率从 132 次/分改善至 112 次/分。

correct.en: Escalation is driven by loss of source control or evolving coagulopathy: recurrent bogginess with heavy bleeding, QBL that rises despite uterotonics and compression, or fibrinogen falling below the critical threshold. Low hemoglobin, oliguria, or persistent tachycardia require treatment and monitoring, but when bleeding is controlled they do not by themselves mandate surgical escalation.
correct.zh: 升级处理主要由出血来源失控或凝血障碍进展驱动：子宫再次松软并大量出血、在宫缩药和压迫后定量失血仍上升，或纤维蛋白原低于临界值。低血红蛋白、少尿或持续心动过速需要治疗和监测；但在出血受控时，它们本身不必然要求手术升级。

byChoice.en: Low urine output shows ongoing hypoperfusion and need for resuscitation, but without recurrent bleeding it is not a direct surgical trigger.
byChoice.zh: 尿量低提示灌注不足，需要继续复苏；但若没有再出血，它不是直接手术指征。

byChoice.en: Correct: recurrent atony with renewed heavy bleeding means source control has failed and escalation is needed.
byChoice.zh: 正确：子宫收缩乏力复发并再次大量出血，说明止血源控制失败，需要升级处理。

byChoice.en: Correct: continued measured blood loss despite uterotonics/compression suggests need for balloon tamponade or operative control.
byChoice.zh: 正确：在宫缩药和压迫后定量失血仍上升，提示可能需要球囊填塞或手术止血。

byChoice.en: Improved but persistent tachycardia requires monitoring; it is not an escalation trigger when bleeding is controlled.
byChoice.zh: 心率虽仍偏快但已有改善，需要监测；在出血受控时不是升级处理触发点。

byChoice.en: Correct: fibrinogen below 200 mg/dL during obstetric bleeding is a critical coagulopathy warning and supports escalation of hemorrhage management.
byChoice.zh: 正确：产科出血时纤维蛋白原低于 200 mg/dL 是凝血障碍的重要警讯，支持升级出血处理。

byChoice.en: With a firm uterus and plateaued QBL, the low hemoglobin supports transfusion and reassessment, not surgery by itself.
byChoice.zh: 在子宫坚硬且定量失血停止上升时，低血红蛋白支持输血和复查，本身不等于需要手术。

testTakingStrategy.en: Do not treat every abnormal lab or vital sign as a surgical trigger. Escalation follows uncontrolled bleeding, recurrent atony, or coagulopathy crossing a critical threshold.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 不要把每个异常化验或生命体征都当作手术触发点。升级处理通常取决于出血失控、子宫收缩乏力复发，或凝血指标跨过关键阈值。

glossary.defZh: 将球囊置入子宫腔内，通过压力减少出血。
用于控制严重子宫出血的一种外科压迫缝合。
凝血形成受损，可加重持续出血。

questions.topic: Postpartum hemorrhage due to uterine atony

correct.en: This case follows recognition, treatment, and evaluation of early postpartum hemorrhage from uterine atony. The decisive cues are heavy bleeding, QBL above the vaginal-birth PPH threshold, a boggy displaced uterus that will not maintain tone, tachycardia, hypotension relative to a hypertensive baseline, poor perfusion, and bladder distention. The intact laceration repair and later exploration narrow the source away from trauma or retained tissue. Priority care is concurrent: maintain uterine compression/massage, administer a safe uterotonic, restore volume through large-bore IV access, prepare blood, and give ordered TXA within the unit protocol. Misoprostol is the safe second-line uterotonic because methylergonovine is contraindicated by pregnancy-induced hypertension and carboprost is unsafe with asthma. Improvement is shown by a firm uterus, decreased lochia, plateaued QBL, clearer mentation, and rising BP; continued concern is shown by anemia, downward fibrinogen trend, oliguria, and persistent tachycardia.
correct.zh: 本病例呈现早期子宫收缩乏力性产后出血的识别、处理和评价。决定性线索包括大量出血、定量失血超过阴道分娩产后出血阈值、子宫底偏移且松软并不能维持张力、心动过速、相对妊娠期高血压基线明显下降的血压、灌注不良以及膀胱充盈。会阴修补处完整以及后续探查结果，使出血来源不支持创伤或胎盘残留。优先护理是并行进行的：维持子宫压迫/按摩，给予安全宫缩药，通过大口径 IV 恢复容量，准备血制品，并按病区方案给予已医嘱的氨甲环酸。米索前列醇是安全的二线宫缩药，因为妊娠期高血压禁用甲基麦角新碱，哮喘病史使卡前列素不安全。改善表现为子宫坚硬、恶露减少、定量失血停止上升、意识转清、血压回升；仍需关注的表现包括贫血、纤维蛋白原下降趋势、少尿和持续心动过速。

testTakingStrategy.en: For postpartum hemorrhage, use the four-T framework but let uterine tone lead the first hypothesis. A boggy uterus means tone/atony until proven otherwise; management must control the source and restore perfusion at the same time.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 处理产后出血题可使用“四个 T”框架，但第一假设要由子宫张力决定。子宫松软时优先考虑张力问题/子宫收缩乏力；处理必须同时控制出血来源并恢复灌注。

glossary.defZh: 分娩后过量出血；传统上指阴道分娩后至少 500 mL，或伴低血容量表现的出血。
产后子宫不能充分收缩，无法止住胎盘附着部位出血。
通过称重材料和收集血液进行客观失血测量。
用于促进子宫收缩的药物。
尿量低于预期最低值，是休克中肾灌注不足的表现。

stem.en: Review the client record and answer the case-study items.
stem.zh: 请查看患者病历，并回答本病例题组。

questions.topic: Postpartum hemorrhage due to uterine atony

stem.en: A 32-year-old G5P5 client is 90 minutes postpartum after vaginal birth of a 4.2 kg infant. She has pregnancy-induced hypertension treated with labetalol and mild intermittent asthma. She has persistent heavy bleeding despite oxytocin and fundal massage. QBL is 1,200 mL, HR 132, BP 80/52, and she is confused and pale. The uterus is intermittently boggy and relaxes within seconds after massage. Bedside exploration shows no retained placental fragments and no cervical or vaginal lacerations beyond the repaired second-degree perineal tear. Select the most likely condition, two priority actions, and two parameters to monitor.
stem.zh: 一名 32 岁 G5P5 产妇阴道分娩 4.2 kg 新生儿后 90 分钟。她有妊娠期高血压，使用拉贝洛尔治疗，并有轻度间歇性哮喘。尽管已使用催产素和子宫底按摩，她仍持续大量出血。定量失血 1,200 mL，HR 132，BP 80/52，患者意识混乱、面色苍白。子宫间歇性松软，按摩后数秒内又松弛。床旁探查未见胎盘碎片残留，也无宫颈或阴道裂伤，只有已修补的二度会阴裂伤。请选择最可能的情况、两个优先措施和两个需要监测的参数。

tokens.en: Primary obstetric coagulopathy
tokens.zh: 原发性产科凝血障碍

tokens.en: Postpartum hemorrhage due to uterine atony
tokens.zh: 子宫收缩乏力导致的产后出血

tokens.en: Cervical or vaginal laceration
tokens.zh: 宫颈或阴道裂伤

tokens.en: Administer methylergonovine 0.2 mg IM
tokens.zh: 给予甲基麦角新碱 0.2 mg IM

tokens.en: Maintain continuous uterine massage/compression
tokens.zh: 持续进行子宫按摩/压迫

tokens.en: Stop fundal massage to draw labs and document
tokens.zh: 停止子宫底按摩以抽血并记录

tokens.en: Administer misoprostol 800 mcg rectally
tokens.zh: 给予米索前列醇 800 mcg 经直肠给药

tokens.en: Quantitative blood loss trend
tokens.zh: 定量失血趋势

tokens.en: Neonatal Apgar scores
tokens.zh: 新生儿 Apgar 评分

tokens.en: Uterine tone and fundal firmness
tokens.zh: 子宫张力和子宫底坚硬度

tokens.en: Serum creatinine as the immediate trajectory marker
tokens.zh: 将血清肌酐作为即时病情趋势指标

correct.en: Persistent bleeding with a boggy uterus that will not sustain tone after massage identifies uterine atony. Exploration has ruled out retained fragments and unrepaired lacerations, and the coagulation profile has not made coagulopathy the primary driver. Priority actions are continuous uterine compression and a safe uterotonic; misoprostol avoids the client's hypertension and asthma contraindications. The most immediate response parameters are uterine tone and measured blood-loss trend.
correct.zh: 持续出血并伴有按摩后不能维持张力的松软子宫，指向子宫收缩乏力。探查已排除胎盘碎片残留和未修补裂伤，凝血资料也不支持凝血障碍为主要驱动因素。优先措施是持续子宫压迫和安全宫缩药；米索前列醇可避开该患者高血压和哮喘相关禁忌。最直接的反应监测参数是子宫张力和定量失血趋势。

byChoice.en: Correct: the boggy uterus, failure to sustain tone, escalating QBL, and risk factors identify atony.
byChoice.zh: 正确：子宫松软、不能维持张力、定量失血增加以及风险因素均指向子宫收缩乏力。

byChoice.en: Wrong: bedside exploration found no cervical or vaginal lacerations beyond the repaired tear, and the uterus is boggy.
byChoice.zh: 错误：床旁探查未发现除已修补裂伤外的宫颈或阴道裂伤，且子宫松软。

byChoice.en: Wrong as the primary diagnosis now: fibrinogen 280 mg/dL, INR 1.1, and aPTT 30 sec do not make coagulopathy the main cause at this moment.
byChoice.zh: 作为当前主要诊断错误：纤维蛋白原 280 mg/dL、INR 1.1、aPTT 30 秒，不支持凝血障碍是此刻主要原因。

byChoice.en: Correct: continuous compression maintains source control while medications and resuscitation take effect.
byChoice.zh: 正确：持续压迫可在药物和复苏发挥作用期间维持止血源控制。

byChoice.en: Correct: misoprostol is the safe uterotonic among the listed options for a client with hypertension and asthma.
byChoice.zh: 正确：在列出的药物中，米索前列醇对同时有高血压和哮喘的患者最安全。

byChoice.en: Wrong: methylergonovine is contraindicated with pregnancy-induced hypertension despite current hemorrhagic hypotension.
byChoice.zh: 错误：即使当前因失血而低血压，妊娠期高血压仍禁用甲基麦角新碱。

byChoice.en: Wrong: stopping compression for labs or documentation can allow renewed bleeding from the atonic uterus.
byChoice.zh: 错误：为了抽血或记录而停止压迫，可能使松软子宫再次出血。

byChoice.en: Correct: fundal tone is the immediate bedside indicator of whether atony is controlled.
byChoice.zh: 正确：子宫底张力是床旁判断子宫收缩乏力是否受控的即时指标。

byChoice.en: Correct: QBL trend shows whether hemorrhage is plateauing or escalating.
byChoice.zh: 正确：定量失血趋势显示出血是在停止上升还是继续加重。

byChoice.en: Wrong: the newborn's status does not guide immediate management of the maternal hemorrhage.
byChoice.zh: 错误：新生儿状态不能指导此刻母体出血的即时处理。

byChoice.en: Wrong for immediate trajectory: creatinine can lag behind acute hypoperfusion; urine output is the real-time renal perfusion cue.
byChoice.zh: 作为即时趋势指标错误：肌酐对急性低灌注反应滞后；尿量才是实时肾灌注线索。

testTakingStrategy.en: In bowtie items, lock the condition to the most decisive cue first. Here the decisive cue is uterine tone; then choose actions and monitoring that directly control and track that condition.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 做 bowtie 题时，先用最决定性的线索锁定病情。本题决定性线索是子宫张力；随后选择能直接控制并追踪该病情的措施和监测项目。

glossary.defZh: 通过触诊子宫底评估产后子宫的坚硬程度。
正常肌肉张力或收缩能力下降。
对累计失血量进行客观测量。

title.en: Celiac disease with dermatitis herpetiformis presenting as chronic malabsorption
title.zh: 以慢性吸收不良表现的乳糜泻合并疱疹样皮炎

summary.en: A 28-year-old woman is evaluated for six months of steatorrhea, bloating, weight loss, fatigue, aphthous ulcers, microcytic anemia, low calcium, low albumin, and an intensely pruritic papulovesicular rash on the extensor elbows and knees. The unfolding course confirms celiac disease with dermatitis herpetiformis, identifies hidden gluten exposure, and evaluates response to strict gluten-free diet, supplementation, and dapsone symptom control.
summary.zh: 一名28岁女性因6个月脂肪泻、腹胀、体重下降、疲乏、阿弗他溃疡、小细胞性贫血、低钙、低白蛋白，以及肘膝伸侧剧痒丘疹水疱样皮疹就诊。病例展开后确认乳糜泻合并疱疹样皮炎，识别隐匿麸质暴露，并评估严格无麸质饮食、营养补充和氨苯砜对症控制后的反应。

content.en: No significant past medical history. Six months of foul-smelling, pale, bulky stools 3-5 times daily, bloating/cramping after meals, 10-lb unintentional weight loss, fatigue, occasional mouth sores, and a 3-month pruritic blistering rash on elbows and knees. Denies bloody stools, fever, joint swelling, or recent travel. Thin-appearing, BMI 19.0. Abdomen mildly distended and diffusely mildly tender without guarding or rebound. Symmetric erythematous papulovesicular lesions on extensor elbows and knees; pale conjunctivae; mild koilonychia.
content.zh: 无明显既往病史。6个月来每日3–5次恶臭、灰白、量多大便，餐后腹胀/绞痛，非故意体重下降10磅，疲乏，偶有口腔溃疡，肘部和膝部瘙痒性水疱样皮疹3个月。否认血便、发热、关节肿胀或近期旅行。外观偏瘦，BMI 19.0。腹部轻度膨隆、弥漫轻压痛，无肌紧张或反跳痛。肘膝伸侧对称红斑性丘疹水疱样皮损；结膜苍白；轻度匙状甲。

content.en: Hgb 10.4 g/dL, MCV 74 fL, WBC 6,200/µL, platelets 310,000/µL. Calcium 7.6 mg/dL, albumin 3.3 g/dL, alkaline phosphatase 142 U/L, creatinine 0.7 mg/dL. Total IgA 245 mg/dL; tTG-IgA pending. ESR 12 mm/hr, CRP 0.4 mg/dL. Qualitative fecal fat positive; stool occult blood negative; no ova or parasites identified.
content.zh: 血红蛋白10.4 g/dL，MCV 74 fL，WBC 6,200/µL，血小板310,000/µL。钙7.6 mg/dL，白蛋白3.3 g/dL，碱性磷酸酶142 U/L，肌酐0.7 mg/dL。总IgA 245 mg/dL；tTG-IgA待回报。ESR 12 mm/hr，CRP 0.4 mg/dL。定性粪脂阳性；粪便隐血阴性；未发现虫卵或寄生虫。

content.en: No significant past medical history. Six months of foul-smelling, pale, bulky stools 3-5 times daily, bloating/cramping after meals, 10-lb unintentional weight loss, fatigue, occasional mouth sores, and a 3-month pruritic blistering rash on elbows and knees. Denies bloody stools, fever, joint swelling, or recent travel. Thin-appearing, BMI 19.0. Abdomen mildly distended and diffusely mildly tender without guarding or rebound. Symmetric erythematous papulovesicular lesions on extensor elbows and knees; pale conjunctivae; mild koilonychia.
content.zh: 无明显既往病史。6个月来每日3–5次恶臭、灰白、量多大便，餐后腹胀/绞痛，非故意体重下降10磅，疲乏，偶有口腔溃疡，肘部和膝部瘙痒性水疱样皮疹3个月。否认血便、发热、关节肿胀或近期旅行。外观偏瘦，BMI 19.0。腹部轻度膨隆、弥漫轻压痛，无肌紧张或反跳痛。肘膝伸侧对称红斑性丘疹水疱样皮损；结膜苍白；轻度匙状甲。

content.en: Hgb 10.4 g/dL, MCV 74 fL, WBC 6,200/µL, platelets 310,000/µL. Calcium 7.6 mg/dL, albumin 3.3 g/dL, alkaline phosphatase 142 U/L, creatinine 0.7 mg/dL. Total IgA 245 mg/dL; tTG-IgA pending. ESR 12 mm/hr, CRP 0.4 mg/dL. Qualitative fecal fat positive; stool occult blood negative; no ova or parasites identified.
content.zh: 血红蛋白10.4 g/dL，MCV 74 fL，WBC 6,200/µL，血小板310,000/µL。钙7.6 mg/dL，白蛋白3.3 g/dL，碱性磷酸酶142 U/L，肌酐0.7 mg/dL。总IgA 245 mg/dL；tTG-IgA待回报。ESR 12 mm/hr，CRP 0.4 mg/dL。定性粪脂阳性；粪便隐血阴性；未发现虫卵或寄生虫。

content.en: tTG-IgA returns at 128 U/mL (reference <4) with normal total IgA. EGD with duodenal biopsy shows villous atrophy, crypt hyperplasia, and increased intraepithelial lymphocytes (Marsh 3a). The gastroenterologist confirms celiac disease and prescribes strict lifelong gluten-free diet. Iron 28 µg/dL, ferritin 8 ng/mL, folate 3.2 ng/mL, B12 280 pg/mL, 25-hydroxyvitamin D 14 ng/mL, and PTH 78 pg/mL. Dermatology referral is placed for perilesional skin biopsy of suspected dermatitis herpetiformis.
content.zh: tTG-IgA回报128 U/mL（参考<4），总IgA正常。EGD十二指肠活检示绒毛萎缩、隐窝增生和上皮内淋巴细胞增多（Marsh 3a）。胃肠科医师确认乳糜泻并开立终身严格无麸质饮食。铁28 µg/dL、铁蛋白8 ng/mL、叶酸3.2 ng/mL、B12 280 pg/mL、25-羟维生素D 14 ng/mL、PTH 78 pg/mL。因疑似疱疹样皮炎，转诊皮肤科进行皮损周围皮肤活检。

title.en: Incomplete early response and dermatitis treatment
title.zh: 早期反应不完全及皮炎治疗

title.en: Incomplete early response and dermatitis treatment
title.zh: 早期反应不完全及皮炎治疗

content.en: After four weeks attempting a gluten-free diet, stools improve to 1-2 times daily and are less pale/malodorous, but the rash remains intensely pruritic and disrupts sleep. The patient reports ongoing hidden gluten exposure from soy sauce containing wheat and standard communion wafers. She is taking iron and vitamin D but has not started folate. Perilesional skin biopsy confirms dermatitis herpetiformis with granular IgA deposits at the dermal papillae. Dermatology prescribes low-dose oral dapsone per protocol with planned titration. Before treatment, normal G6PD level, CBC with differential, reticulocyte count, liver function, renal function, and urinalysis are reviewed. The nurse teaches frequent early blood work and warning symptoms: cyanosis, shortness of breath, severe fatigue, jaundice, fever, sore throat, or widespread rash.
content.zh: 尝试无麸质饮食4周后，大便改善为每日1–2次，颜色和气味改善，但皮疹仍剧痒并影响睡眠。患者报告仍通过含小麦酱油和普通圣餐饼发生隐匿麸质暴露。她正在服铁剂和维生素D，但尚未开始叶酸。皮损周围活检证实疱疹样皮炎，真皮乳头见颗粒状IgA沉积。皮肤科按方案开立低剂量口服氨苯砜并计划滴定。治疗前已复核G6PD正常、CBC分类、网织红细胞计数、肝功能、肾功能和尿液分析。护士教育早期需频繁验血，并报告发绀、气短、严重疲乏、黄疸、发热、咽痛或广泛皮疹等警示症状。

content.en: The patient eliminated hidden gluten sources and has been strictly gluten-free for three months. She uses wheat-free tamari and gluten-free communion wafers. She takes iron, folic acid, and vitamin D. She is on dapsone 50 mg daily with dermatology planning taper after rash control. Rash is nearly resolved; stools are formed, brown, once daily; bloating resolved; energy improved; mouth sores have not recurred; weight is 123 lb. Labs: Hgb 12.1 g/dL, MCV 82 fL, ferritin 22 ng/mL, folate 8.6 ng/mL, vitamin D 32 ng/mL, calcium 8.6 mg/dL, PTH 42 pg/mL, albumin 3.8 g/dL, tTG-IgA 38 U/mL. The provider explains the falling tTG-IgA supports response and orders DEXA because prior vitamin D deficiency, hypocalcemia, and secondary hyperparathyroidism increase bone-health risk.
content.zh: 患者已消除隐匿麸质来源，并严格无麸质3个月。她使用无小麦日式酱油和无麸质圣餐饼。她服用铁剂、叶酸和维生素D。氨苯砜50 mg每日一次，皮肤科计划皮疹控制后逐渐减量。皮疹几乎消退；大便成形、棕色、每日一次；腹胀消失；精力改善；口腔溃疡未复发；体重123磅。实验室：血红蛋白12.1 g/dL，MCV 82 fL，铁蛋白22 ng/mL，叶酸8.6 ng/mL，维生素D 32 ng/mL，钙8.6 mg/dL，PTH 42 pg/mL，白蛋白3.8 g/dL，tTG-IgA 38 U/mL。医师说明tTG-IgA下降支持治疗反应，并因既往维生素D缺乏、低钙和继发性甲旁亢增加骨健康风险而安排DEXA。

stem.en: Highlight the findings that form the celiac malabsorption and dermatitis herpetiformis cue cluster.
stem.zh: 请标出构成乳糜泻吸收不良和疱疹样皮炎线索群的发现。

segments.en: Six months of foul-smelling, pale, bulky stools that are difficult to flush.
segments.zh: 6个月来反复出现恶臭、灰白、量多且难以冲走的大便。

segments.en: Unintentional 10-lb weight loss despite unchanged appetite.
segments.zh: 食欲未变但非故意体重下降10磅。

segments.en: Abdominal bloating and cramping are worse after meals.
segments.zh: 餐后腹胀和腹部绞痛加重。

segments.en: Two small aphthous ulcers are present on the buccal mucosa.
segments.zh: 颊黏膜可见两个小的阿弗他溃疡。

segments.en: Hemoglobin is 10.4 g/dL with MCV 74 fL, pale conjunctivae, and koilonychia.
segments.zh: 血红蛋白10.4 g/dL，MCV 74 fL，并有结膜苍白和匙状甲。

segments.en: Calcium is 7.6 mg/dL and albumin is 3.3 g/dL.
segments.zh: 钙7.6 mg/dL，白蛋白3.3 g/dL。

segments.en: Clusters of intensely pruritic papulovesicular lesions are symmetric on the extensor elbows and knees.
segments.zh: 双侧肘部和膝部伸侧对称分布成簇、剧痒的丘疹水疱样皮损。

segments.en: ESR and CRP are within normal limits.
segments.zh: ESR和CRP在正常范围内。

segments.en: Stool occult blood is negative.
segments.zh: 粪便隐血阴性。

segments.en: No fever, bloody stool, recent travel, or joint swelling is reported.
segments.zh: 未报告发热、血便、近期旅行或关节肿胀。

correct.en: Steatorrhea, weight loss, postprandial bloating, aphthous ulcers, iron-deficiency-pattern anemia, hypocalcemia/hypoalbuminemia, and a symmetric pruritic papulovesicular extensor-surface rash cluster around proximal small-bowel malabsorption with dermatitis herpetiformis. Normal inflammatory markers and negative occult blood help move inflammatory bowel disease or hemorrhagic causes lower on the differential.
correct.zh: 脂肪泻、体重下降、餐后腹胀、阿弗他溃疡、缺铁模式贫血、低钙/低白蛋白，以及伸侧对称分布的剧痒丘疹水疱样皮疹，共同指向近端小肠吸收不良合并疱疹样皮炎。炎症指标正常、隐血阴性，有助于降低炎症性肠病或出血性病因的可能性。

byChoice.en: Bulky pale foul-smelling stools with positive fecal fat are steatorrhea, a major malabsorption cue.
byChoice.zh: 量多、灰白、恶臭且粪脂阳性的粪便提示脂肪泻，是重要的吸收不良线索。

byChoice.en: Unintentional weight loss with preserved appetite supports malabsorption rather than simple low intake.
byChoice.zh: 食欲未变而体重下降支持吸收不良，而不是单纯摄入不足。

byChoice.en: Meal-related bloating and cramping fit intestinal malabsorption and gas production from poorly absorbed nutrients.
byChoice.zh: 餐后腹胀绞痛符合肠道吸收不良及未吸收营养物发酵产气。

byChoice.en: Recurrent aphthous ulcers can occur with celiac-related nutritional deficiency and mucosal inflammation.
byChoice.zh: 反复阿弗他溃疡可见于乳糜泻相关营养缺乏和黏膜炎症。

byChoice.en: Microcytosis with pale conjunctivae and koilonychia is an iron-deficiency pattern from proximal small-bowel malabsorption.
byChoice.zh: 小细胞贫血伴结膜苍白和匙状甲是缺铁模式，可由近端小肠吸收不良引起。

byChoice.en: Low calcium and albumin support clinically significant malabsorption and nutritional deficiency.
byChoice.zh: 低钙和低白蛋白支持有临床意义的吸收不良和营养缺乏。

byChoice.en: Grouped intensely pruritic papulovesicles on extensor surfaces are classic for dermatitis herpetiformis, a celiac-associated skin manifestation.
byChoice.zh: 伸侧成簇剧痒丘疹水疱样皮损是疱疹样皮炎的典型表现，常与乳糜泻相关。

byChoice.en: Normal ESR and CRP are useful counter-cues against an inflammatory-marker-driven diagnosis such as active inflammatory bowel disease, so they are not part of the positive celiac cue cluster.
byChoice.zh: ESR和CRP正常是反向线索，可降低活动性炎症性肠病等炎症指标驱动诊断的可能性，不属于乳糜泻阳性线索群。

byChoice.en: Negative occult blood helps argue against a bleeding or inflammatory colitis pattern; it is not a malabsorption cue itself.
byChoice.zh: 隐血阴性有助于排除出血性或炎症性结肠炎模式，本身不是吸收不良线索。

byChoice.en: Absence of fever, travel, blood, and joint swelling helps narrow the differential but is not part of the positive malabsorption-DH cluster.
byChoice.zh: 无发热、旅行、血便和关节肿胀有助于缩小鉴别诊断，但不属于吸收不良-疱疹样皮炎阳性线索群。

testTakingStrategy.en: Cluster objective findings by body system and pathophysiology. A skin finding can be the decisive cue when it has a disease-specific pattern.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 按系统和病理生理把客观发现归类。皮肤表现若具有疾病特异性分布，可能成为关键线索。

glossary.defZh: 粪便含脂肪过多，常表现为量多、油腻、恶臭、难冲。
与乳糜泻相关的剧痒丘疹水疱样皮疹，常见于伸侧。
指甲呈勺状凹陷，常与缺铁有关。

stem.en: For each Stage 1 result, select the interpretation that best fits the clinical picture.
stem.zh: 针对第1阶段的每项结果，选择最符合临床图像的解释。

rows.en: tTG-IgA 128 U/mL with total IgA 245 mg/dL
rows.zh: tTG-IgA 128 U/mL，且总IgA 245 mg/dL

rows.en: Duodenal biopsy: villous atrophy, crypt hyperplasia, increased intraepithelial lymphocytes
rows.zh: 十二指肠活检：绒毛萎缩、隐窝增生、上皮内淋巴细胞增多

rows.en: Iron 28 µg/dL, ferritin 8 ng/mL, MCV 74 fL
rows.zh: 铁28 µg/dL、铁蛋白8 ng/mL、MCV 74 fL

rows.en: Vitamin D 14 ng/mL, low calcium, PTH 78 pg/mL
rows.zh: 维生素D 14 ng/mL、低钙、PTH 78 pg/mL

rows.en: Vitamin B12 280 pg/mL
rows.zh: 维生素B12 280 pg/mL

rows.en: Normal ESR/CRP and negative stool occult blood
rows.zh: ESR/CRP正常且粪便隐血阴性

columns.zh: 显示吸收不良相关缺乏
预期/相对保留模式或反向线索

correct.en: Stage 1 confirms celiac disease by pairing markedly positive tTG-IgA with normal total IgA and characteristic duodenal histology. The iron/folate/vitamin D/calcium pattern reflects proximal small-bowel malabsorption. B12 is normal in this case and is not the main proximal-malabsorption signal, while normal ESR/CRP and negative occult blood are counter-cues against active IBD or bleeding.
correct.zh: 第1阶段通过显著升高的tTG-IgA、正常总IgA和典型十二指肠组织学结果确认乳糜泻。铁/叶酸/维生素D/钙的异常反映近端小肠吸收不良。本病例B12正常，并非主要的近端吸收不良信号；ESR/CRP正常和隐血阴性则是反向线索，不支持活动性炎症性肠病或出血。

byChoice.en: The normal total IgA makes the IgA-based tTG result interpretable; the markedly elevated value supports celiac disease.
byChoice.zh: 总IgA正常说明基于IgA的tTG结果可解释；显著升高支持乳糜泻。

byChoice.en: Villous atrophy with crypt hyperplasia and increased intraepithelial lymphocytes is the characteristic small-bowel histology used with serology to confirm celiac disease.
byChoice.zh: 绒毛萎缩、隐窝增生和上皮内淋巴细胞增多是乳糜泻特征性小肠组织学表现，可与血清学共同确认诊断。

byChoice.en: Low iron and ferritin with microcytosis explain the anemia and fit proximal small-bowel malabsorption.
byChoice.zh: 低铁、低铁蛋白伴小细胞性改变解释贫血，符合近端小肠吸收不良。

byChoice.en: Low vitamin D and calcium with elevated PTH indicate secondary hyperparathyroidism from malabsorption-related deficiency and raise bone-health risk.
byChoice.zh: 低维生素D和低钙伴PTH升高提示吸收不良相关缺乏导致继发性甲状旁腺功能亢进，并增加骨健康风险。

byChoice.en: This B12 is within the stated reference range; do not assume every vitamin must be low in celiac disease.
byChoice.zh: 该B12在给定参考范围内；不要假设乳糜泻一定导致所有维生素都降低。

byChoice.en: Normal inflammatory markers and negative occult blood help distinguish the case from active IBD or hemorrhagic colitis.
byChoice.zh: 炎症指标正常和隐血阴性有助于区别于活动性炎症性肠病或出血性结肠炎。

testTakingStrategy.en: Before interpreting a celiac serology result, check whether total IgA makes the IgA-based test valid. Then map deficiencies to where nutrients are absorbed.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 解读乳糜泻血清学前，先确认总IgA是否让IgA类检测有效；再把营养缺乏与吸收部位对应起来。

glossary.termZh: 组织转谷氨酰胺酶IgA抗体
glossary.defZh: 乳糜泻常用血清学检测；需结合总IgA解释。
小肠绒毛变短或消失，导致吸收面积减少。

glossary.termZh: 继发性甲状旁腺功能亢进
glossary.defZh: 低钙或低维生素D刺激PTH升高，以维持血钙。

stem.en: At Stage 1, which diagnosis best explains the complete pattern of findings?
stem.zh: 在第1阶段，哪项诊断最能解释所有发现的整体模式？

options.en: Crohn disease with extraintestinal skin manifestations
options.zh: 克罗恩病伴肠外皮肤表现

options.en: Irritable bowel syndrome with eczema
options.zh: 肠易激综合征伴湿疹

options.en: Contact dermatitis with unrelated dietary intolerance
options.zh: 接触性皮炎伴无关的饮食不耐受

options.en: Celiac disease with dermatitis herpetiformis
options.zh: 乳糜泻合并疱疹样皮炎

correct.en: The markedly elevated tTG-IgA with normal total IgA, Marsh 3a duodenal biopsy, steatorrhea, proximal malabsorption deficiencies, and classic extensor papulovesicular rash point to celiac disease with dermatitis herpetiformis. Perilesional skin biopsy is used to confirm the skin manifestation; the duodenal biopsy confirms intestinal celiac disease.
correct.zh: 显著升高的tTG-IgA且总IgA正常、Marsh 3a十二指肠活检、脂肪泻、近端吸收不良缺乏和典型伸侧丘疹水疱样皮疹，共同指向乳糜泻合并疱疹样皮炎。皮损周围皮肤活检用于确认皮肤表现；十二指肠活检确认肠道乳糜泻。

byChoice.en: This option integrates the confirmed intestinal disease and the classic celiac-associated rash.
byChoice.zh: 该选项同时整合了已确认的肠道疾病和典型乳糜泻相关皮疹。

byChoice.en: Contact dermatitis follows an exposure pattern and would not account for confirmed celiac serology, biopsy findings, and malabsorption deficiencies.
byChoice.zh: 接触性皮炎通常符合接触暴露分布，不能解释已确认的乳糜泻血清学、活检结果和吸收不良缺乏。

byChoice.en: Crohn disease does not explain the markedly positive celiac serology and villous atrophy pattern; normal ESR/CRP and negative occult blood also make active IBD less likely here.
byChoice.zh: 克罗恩病不能解释显著阳性的乳糜泻血清学和绒毛萎缩模式；ESR/CRP正常和隐血阴性也使本病例活动性IBD可能性较低。

byChoice.en: IBS is functional and does not cause weight loss, steatorrhea, anemia, hypocalcemia, hypoalbuminemia, or villous atrophy.
byChoice.zh: IBS为功能性疾病，不会导致体重下降、脂肪泻、贫血、低钙、低白蛋白或绒毛萎缩。

testTakingStrategy.en: Prioritize the diagnosis that explains the most objective data with the fewest unrelated assumptions.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 优先选择能用最少无关假设解释最多客观数据的诊断。

glossary.defZh: 描述乳糜泻小肠黏膜损伤程度的组织学分级。
包括克罗恩病和溃疡性结肠炎的慢性肠道炎症性疾病。

stem.en: At Stage 2, which nursing actions should be included in the plan of care? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 在第2阶段，护理计划应包括哪些措施？选择所有适用项。

options.en: Advise stopping dapsone now because the gluten-free diet should immediately clear the rash.
options.zh: 建议立即停用氨苯砜，因为无麸质饮食应立刻清除皮疹。

options.en: Teach the patient that soy sauce containing wheat and standard communion wafers are ongoing gluten exposures.
options.zh: 教育患者含小麦的酱油和普通圣餐饼仍属于持续麸质暴露。

options.en: Review cross-contamination prevention and ask the pharmacist to verify medications and supplements for gluten-containing inactive ingredients.
options.zh: 复习防止交叉污染的方法，并请药师核查药物和补充剂是否含有麸质相关辅料。

options.en: Reinforce folate supplementation because the folate level is low and red blood cell production must recover.
options.zh: 强化叶酸补充，因为叶酸水平低且红细胞生成需要恢复。

options.en: Explain that dapsone can relieve dermatitis herpetiformis symptoms but does not treat intestinal villous injury.
options.zh: 说明氨苯砜可缓解疱疹样皮炎症状，但不能治疗肠道绒毛损伤。

options.en: Tell the patient that partial GI improvement means small weekly gluten exposures are acceptable.
options.zh: 告诉患者胃肠症状部分改善说明每周少量麸质暴露可以接受。

correct.en: The incomplete response is explained by ongoing hidden gluten exposure and incomplete supplement adherence. The nurse should target the identified gluten sources, reinforce strict lifelong avoidance and cross-contamination prevention, explain dapsone's symptomatic role, and support correction of documented deficiencies.
correct.zh: 反应不完全可由隐匿麸质暴露和补充剂依从性不足解释。护士应针对已发现的麸质来源进行教育，强化终身严格避免和防止交叉污染，说明氨苯砜的对症作用，并支持纠正文档记录的营养缺乏。

byChoice.en: Dapsone can rapidly reduce pruritus and lesions, but gluten avoidance treats the underlying celiac process.
byChoice.zh: 氨苯砜可较快减轻瘙痒和皮损，但避免麸质才治疗乳糜泻的根本过程。

byChoice.en: Small ongoing gluten exposures can sustain immune activity and symptoms; partial improvement does not make them acceptable.
byChoice.zh: 持续少量麸质暴露也可维持免疫活动和症状；部分好转并不代表可以接受。

byChoice.en: These are case-specific hidden gluten sources that can perpetuate intestinal and skin disease.
byChoice.zh: 这些是病例中特定的隐匿麸质来源，可持续刺激肠道和皮肤疾病。

byChoice.en: Cross-contamination and inactive ingredients are practical sources of inadvertent gluten exposure that nursing education should address.
byChoice.zh: 交叉污染和非活性辅料是无意麸质暴露的实际来源，护理教育应涵盖。

byChoice.en: Dermatitis herpetiformis can take months or longer to fully respond to diet; stopping dapsone without a provider plan may leave severe pruritus uncontrolled.
byChoice.zh: 疱疹样皮炎完全随饮食改善可能需要数月或更久；未经医嘱停用氨苯砜可能使严重瘙痒失控。

byChoice.en: Folate is documented as low and is needed for hematologic recovery; it is not optional because the patient already takes iron and vitamin D.
byChoice.zh: 叶酸已明确偏低，并且血液学恢复需要叶酸；不能因为已服铁和维生素D就认为叶酸可选。

testTakingStrategy.en: When a chronic disease is improving only partially, look first for adherence barriers and hidden exposures before assuming treatment failure.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 慢性病仅部分改善时，先寻找依从性障碍和隐匿暴露，再考虑治疗失败。
